ontology/bosses/hexaghost.md
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+# Hexaghost
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 250 (A0), 264 (A9)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Activate (no damage, setup), then Divider. After that, repeats a 7-move cycle: Sear -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inflame -> Tackle -> Sear -> Inferno.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Activate | -- | Setup turn |
+| Divider | (player max HP / 12 + 1) x 6 | At 80 max HP = 7x6 = 42. At 70 = 6x6 = 36 |
+| Sear | 6 | Adds 1 Burn to discard (2 Burns at A19) |
+| Tackle | 5x2 = 10 (6x2 = 12 at A4) | -- |
+| Inflame | -- | Gains 12 Block + 2 [[buffs/Strength]] (3 Str at A19) |
+| Inferno | 2x6 = 12 (3x6 = 18 at A4) | Adds 3 Burns to discard. Upgrades all existing Burns to Burns+. |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Burn Cards:** Unplayable status cards. Deal 2 damage per Burn in hand at end of turn. Clog hand (fewer real cards). Burns+ (upgraded by Inferno) deal 4 damage each.
+
+**Burns are DOUBLE-LETHAL:** Burns eat block at end of turn (reducing to zero), AND THEN the next Hexaghost attack hits with no block remaining. Effective incoming = Burns + attack combined.
+
+**[[buffs/Strength]] Scaling:** Gains [[buffs/Strength]] on Inflame turns, making subsequent attacks stronger.
+
+**Inferno Damage:** Multi-hit means each hit is checked against block individually. Without [[debuffs/Weak]]: near-impossible to survive. With [[debuffs/Weak]]: 28 total (survivable).
+
+**Turn 1 Free:** Activate does nothing.
+
+**Fight Length:** ~13 turns with adequate damage. Can extend to 23+ turns without damage scaling.
ontology/bosses/slime-boss.md
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+# Slime Boss
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 140 (A0), 150 (A9)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Fixed repeating cycle: Goop Spray -> Preparing -> Slam. Splits at 50% HP or below.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Goop Spray | -- | Adds 3 Slimed cards to discard pile (5 at A19) |
+| Preparing | -- | Does nothing |
+| Slam | 35 (38 at A4) | -- |
+| Split | -- | At 50% HP (70 remaining at A0), spawns 1 [[enemies/Acid Slime L]] + 1 [[enemies/Spike Slime L]], each with boss's current HP |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Split at 50% HP:** Disappears and spawns [[enemies/Spike Slime L]] + [[enemies/Acid Slime L]] with current HP each. Excess damage past 70 HP is wasted AND makes the fight harder (lower HP = lower split HP for each slime).
+
+**Slimed Cards:** Cost 1E to exhaust, do nothing. Clog hand (3 of 5 cards being Slimed observed).
+
+**Post-Split Large Slimes Split Again:** Both [[enemies/Spike Slime L]] and [[enemies/Acid Slime L]] split into 2 medium slimes when killed at 50% HP. Killing one large slime creates a 3-enemy situation.
+
+**Post-Split Damage:** Combined 25-36 damage per turn from two large slimes. [[debuffs/Frail]] (Spike Slime) + [[debuffs/Weak]] (Acid Slime) applied simultaneously.
+
+## Pre-Split Phase
+
+Alternates between debuff turns (Goop Spray + Preparing = safe to go all-in) and Slam (35 damage). Debuff turns are safe windows for damage.
ontology/bosses/spire-shield.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Spire Shield
+
+- **Type:** Boss (Act 4, pre-Heart fight)
+- **Act:** 4
+- **HP:** 110-120
+
+## Pattern
+
+Alternates Bash and Fortify. Can also use Smash.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bash | 12 | -- |
+| Fortify | -- | Gives [[bosses/Spire Spear]] 30 [[buffs/Block]] |
+| Smash | 34 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Paired with [[bosses/Spire Spear]] in the Act 4 elite fight before the Heart
+- Provides Block to [[bosses/Spire Spear]] — kill order matters
ontology/bosses/spire-spear.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Spire Spear
+
+- **Type:** Boss (Act 4, pre-Heart fight)
+- **Act:** 4
+- **HP:** 160-170
+
+## Pattern
+
+Alternates between Burn Strike and Piercer. Can also Skewer.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Burn Strike | 5x2 | Shuffle 2 Burns into discard pile |
+| Piercer | 10 | Apply 2 [[debuffs/Frail]] |
+| Skewer | 8x3 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Paired with [[bosses/Spire Shield]] in the Act 4 elite fight before the Heart
+- Burns clog deck; [[debuffs/Frail]] reduces your blocking capability
ontology/bosses/the-champ.md
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+# The Champ
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 420 (A0), 440 (A9)
+
+Single target. Two-phase fight with a dangerous transition.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Heavy Slash | 16 (18 at A4) | -- |
+| Face Slap | 12 (14 at A4) | Applies 2 [[debuffs/Frail]] + 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] |
+| Defensive Stance | -- | Gains 15 Block + 5 [[buffs/Metallicize]] |
+| Gloat | -- | Gains 2 [[buffs/Strength]] (3 at A4, 4 at A19) |
+| Taunt | -- | Applies 2 [[debuffs/Weak]] + 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] |
+| Execute | 10x2 = 20 | -- |
+| Anger | -- | Removes ALL debuffs, gains 6 [[buffs/Strength]] (9 at A4, 12 at A19) |
+
+## Phase 1 (Above 50% HP)
+
+Uses Taunt every 4 turns. On other turns: 15% Defensive Stance, 15% Gloat, 25% Face Slap, 45% Heavy Slash. No move used consecutively.
+
+## Phase 2 -- Anger Transition (Below 50% HP)
+
+When HP drops below 50%, performs Anger: removes ALL debuffs, gains 6 [[buffs/Strength]] (+9 at A4, +12 at A19). Then repeats: Random Move -> Random Move -> Execute (10x2 = 20 damage).
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Anger (Phase Transition):** Removes ALL player-applied debuffs ([[debuffs/Vulnerable]], [[debuffs/Weak]], [[buffs/Strength]] reduction). Gains massive permanent [[buffs/Strength]]. All debuffs applied before this point are wasted.
+
+**Execute Pattern:** After Anger, repeats a 3-move cycle ending with Execute (10x2, but with +6-12 Str = 16x2 to 22x2).
+
+**[[buffs/Metallicize]] 5:** From Defensive Stance, gains 5 passive block per turn permanently.
ontology/bosses/the-collector.md
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# The Collector
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 282 (A0), 300 (A9)
+
+## Pattern
+
+- **Turn 1:** Always Spawn -- summons 2 Torch Head minions (HP: 38-40, attack for 7 damage each).
+- **Turn 2-3:** Fireball (18 damage) or Buff (all enemies gain 3 [[buffs/Strength]], Collector gains 15 Block).
+- **Turn 4:** Always Mega Debuff -- Applies 3 [[debuffs/Weak]] + 3 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] + 3 [[debuffs/Frail]] simultaneously. No damage.
+- **Turn 5+:** With 0-1 minions: Spawn 25% / Fireball 45% / Buff 30%. With 2 minions: Fireball 70% / Buff 30%. Cannot use Buff 2x in a row. Cannot use Fireball 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Spawn | -- | Summons 2 Torch Heads (38-40 HP, attack for 7 each/turn) |
+| Fireball | 18 | -- |
+| Buff | -- | All enemies gain 3 [[buffs/Strength]] + Collector gains 15 Block |
+| Mega Debuff | -- | Applies 3 [[debuffs/Weak]] + 3 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] + 3 [[debuffs/Frail]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Mega Debuff (Turn 4):** Applies ALL THREE debuffs simultaneously. [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] 3 (50% more damage taken), [[debuffs/Frail]] 3 (25% less block), [[debuffs/Weak]] 3 (25% less damage dealt). The following 3 turns are the crisis window.
+
+**[[buffs/Strength]] Scaling (Buff):** Each Buff gives ALL enemies +3 [[buffs/Strength]]. Over a long fight with 4+ Buff uses, Collector Str escalates to 9-14+. By Turn 15-19, Fireball hits for 30+ instead of 18. Torch Heads also gain +3 Str per Buff.
+
+**Torch Heads:** 38-40 HP each. Tackle for 7 damage every turn. Collector resummons if killed (max 2 active).
+
+**Combined Threat:** HP check boss AND DPS race. Low HP entry means Mega Debuff creates unwinnable math. Slow kill means Str scaling compounds to lethal levels.
ontology/bosses/the-guardian.md
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+# The Guardian
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 240 (A0), 250 (A9)
+
+## Pattern
+
+**Offensive Mode** (repeating cycle): Charging Up (9 Block) -> Fierce Bash (32 damage) -> Vent Steam (2 [[debuffs/Weak]] + 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]) -> Whirlwind (5x4 = 20 damage).
+
+**[[buffs/Mode Shift]]:** After taking 30 HP of damage (first cycle; 40 second, 50 third, +10 each), gains 20 Block and switches to Defensive Mode. Triggering [[buffs/Mode Shift]] mid-attack CANCELS the current attack.
+
+**Defensive Mode:** [[buffs/Sharp Hide]] 3 (deal 3 damage to player per [[types/Attack]] card played) -> Roll Attack (9 damage) -> Twin Slam (8x2 = 16 damage, Removes [[buffs/Sharp Hide]], resets [[buffs/Mode Shift]] counter) -> returns to Offensive Mode.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Charging Up | -- | Gains 9 Block |
+| Fierce Bash | 32 | -- |
+| Vent Steam | -- | Applies 2 [[debuffs/Weak]] + 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] |
+| Whirlwind | 5x4 = 20 | -- |
+| [[buffs/Sharp Hide]] | -- | Player takes 3 damage per [[types/Attack]] card played |
+| Roll Attack | 9 | -- |
+| Twin Slam | 8x2 = 16 | Removes [[buffs/Sharp Hide]], resets [[buffs/Mode Shift]] counter |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**[[buffs/Mode Shift]]:** Counter values are 30, 40, 50 (+10 each cycle). Only HP damage counts (damage absorbed by block does NOT reduce counter). Triggering mid-attack cancels the attack -- primary survival mechanic.
+
+**[[buffs/Sharp Hide]] 3:** 3 damage to player per [[types/Attack]] card played in Defensive Mode. Powers are safe (no trigger).
+
+**32-Damage Attack:** The Guardian's biggest single hit. Must have 32+ block capability in one turn.
+
+**Fight Length:** 240 HP means 12-14 turns minimum.
+
+**Free Turns:** DEFEND and STRONG_DEBUFF intents deal no damage.
ontology/bosses/time-eater.md
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Time Eater
+
+- **Type:** Boss
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 456 (A0), 480 (A9)
+
+Single target. The card-count boss.
+
+## Pattern
+
+45% Reverberate, 35% Head Slam, 20% Ripple. Cannot use Reverberate 3x in a row. Cannot use Head Slam or Ripple 2x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Reverberate | 7x3 = 21 (8x3 = 24 at A4) | -- |
+| Head Slam | 26 (32 at A4) | Applies 1 [[debuffs/Draw Reduction]] (adds 2 Slimed at A19) |
+| Ripple | -- | Gains 20 Block + applies 1 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] + 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] (+ 1 [[debuffs/Frail]] at A19) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**[[debuffs/Time Warp]]:** Every 12 cards played, Time Eater heals 32 HP, gains +2 [[buffs/Strength]], and ends your turn immediately. Every card play counts, including 0-cost cards, Shivs, Powers, and cards generated mid-turn.
+
+**Haste (at 50% HP, once):** Removes all debuffs, heals to 50% HP (228 at A0), gains 32 Block. Effectively means ~684 total damage needed to kill (456 * 1.5). Must re-apply debuffs after.
+
+**Effective HP:** ~684 total damage needed (456 HP + 228 heal from Haste + 32 per Time Warp trigger).
+
+**Echo Form Interaction (Defect):** Each card doubled by Echo Form counts as 2 plays toward Time Warp, not 1. Effective budget per cycle is ~6 real card plays with Echo Form active.
ontology/buffs/artifact.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Artifact
+
+- **Effect:** Negates the next N debuffs applied to the entity. Each debuff negated consumes 1 stack.
+- **Duration:** Permanent until all stacks consumed
+- **Sources (player):** [[relics/Clockwork Souvenir]] (1 at combat start), [[cards/Panacea]] (1/2), [[cards/Core Surge]] (1)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Bronze Automaton]] (3 at combat start), various bosses/elites
+- **What counts as a debuff:** [[debuffs/Vulnerable]], [[debuffs/Weak]], [[debuffs/Frail]], Strength Down, etc.
+- **Strategy interaction:** Must strip Artifact before debuffs will apply. Cheap debuffs ([[cards/Thunderclap]] 1E for [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] to all) are efficient Artifact strippers.
ontology/buffs/barricade.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Barricade
+
+- **Effect:** [[buffs/Block]] is not removed at the start of turn. All Block persists indefinitely until used to absorb damage.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Barricade]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 3E / 2E upgraded), [[relics/Calipers]] (keeps up to 15 Block between turns — similar but not identical)
+- **Interaction:** Stacks with all Block-generating effects ([[buffs/Metallicize]], [[buffs/Flame Barrier]], [[buffs/Feel No Pain]]). Block accumulates without limit across turns.
+- **Strategy implication:** Extremely powerful with repeatable Block generation. Enables "infinite Block" strategies.
ontology/buffs/block.md
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# Block
+
+- **Effect:** Absorbs incoming damage before HP. Damage reduces Block first; excess hits HP.
+- **Duration:** Expires at the start of the player's turn (resets to 0)
+- **Exceptions:**
+ - [[buffs/Barricade]] ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]]): Block does NOT expire between turns. Accumulates.
+ - [[relics/Calipers]]: Lose only 15 Block at start of turn (instead of all).
+ - [[cards/Blur]] ([[characters/Silent]]): Block doesn't expire this turn.
+- **Modified by:**
+ - [[buffs/Dexterity]]: +1 Block per point to all block-gaining cards
+ - [[debuffs/Frail]]: x0.75 Block from cards
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Defend]] cards, [[types/Skill]]s that grant Block, Frost orbs ([[characters/Defect]]), [[buffs/Metallicize]] (end of turn), [[buffs/Plated Armor]] (end of turn)
+- **Enemy block:** Enemies also gain Block. It does NOT expire for enemies unless specified. Enemy Block absorbs your attacks.
ontology/buffs/buffer.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Buffer
+
+- **Effect:** Prevents the next N instances of HP loss. Each time HP loss would occur, it is negated and Buffer decreases by 1.
+- **Duration:** Permanent until all stacks consumed
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Buffer]] card ([[characters/Defect]] [[types/Power]], 2E)
+- **Sources (enemy):** Some enemies/bosses can gain Buffer
+- **Interaction:** Prevents ALL HP loss including [[debuffs/Poison]] damage, not just attack damage. Does NOT prevent [[buffs/Block]] loss.
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple Buffer applications stack.
ontology/buffs/burst.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Burst
+
+- **Effect:** The next N [[types/Skill]] cards played are played twice (the card is played an additional time for free).
+- **Duration:** Expires at end of turn if unused, or after N Skills are doubled
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Burst]] card ([[characters/Silent]] [[types/Skill]], 1E), duplicates Skill effects
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Burst 2 means the next 2 Skills are doubled.
+- **Interaction:** Similar to [[cards/Double Tap]] (which doubles [[types/Attack]]s) and [[cards/Amplify]] (which doubles [[types/Power]]s). Does not duplicate card draw costs or exhaust — the copy plays automatically.
ontology/buffs/curl-up.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Curl Up
+
+- **Effect:** The first time the entity takes [[types/Attack]] damage, gain N [[buffs/Block]]
+- **Duration:** Single use (consumed on first attack received)
+- **Value:** 3-7 (varies by enemy instance)
+- **Sources (enemy):** Louse ([[enemies/Red Louse]] and [[enemies/Green Louse]] variants)
ontology/buffs/dark-embrace.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Dark Embrace
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Dark Embrace]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 2E / 1E upgraded)
+- **Stacking:** Multiple instances stack. Two Dark Embraces = draw 2 cards per Exhaust.
+- **Interaction:** Synergizes with Exhaust-heavy builds ([[cards/Corruption]], [[cards/Sentinel]], [[buffs/Feel No Pain]]). With Corruption, every [[types/Skill]] exhausts on play, drawing a replacement card.
ontology/buffs/dexterity.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Dexterity
+
+- **Effect:** Each point adds 1 [[buffs/Block]] to all block-gaining cards
+- **Duration:** Permanent within combat, resets to 0 between combats
+- **Negative Dexterity:** Reduces block from all block cards. Applied by [[enemies/Lagavulin]] debuff, [[debuffs/Wraith Form]] (-1/turn permanent).
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Footwork]] (+2/+3), [[relics/Oddly Smooth Stone]] (+1 relic), [[relics/Data Disk]] (+1 relic, [[characters/Defect]])
ontology/buffs/enrage.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Enrage
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever the player plays a [[types/Skill]] card, the entity with Enrage gains N [[buffs/Strength]]
+- **Duration:** Permanent (does not decrement)
+- **Trigger:** Player playing a [[types/Skill]] card. [[types/Power]] cards and [[types/Attack]] cards do NOT trigger it.
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Gremlin Nob]] (gains Enrage 2 via Bellow on Turn 1)
+- **Timing:** Skills played before Enrage is active (before Bellow) do not trigger it.
ontology/buffs/evolve.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Evolve
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you draw a [[types/Status]] card, draw N additional cards.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Evolve]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 1E), draw 1/2 cards per Status drawn
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple Evolves stack the draw count.
+- **Interaction:** Triggers on [[types/Status]] cards (Wounds, Burns, Dazed, Slimed, Void). Does NOT trigger on [[types/Curse]]s. Synergizes with [[cards/Wild Strike]], [[cards/Reckless Charge]], [[cards/Power Through]] (which add Statuses to your deck).
ontology/buffs/feel-no-pain.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Feel No Pain
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain N [[buffs/Block]].
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Feel No Pain]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 1E), grants 3/4 Block per Exhaust
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple instances stack the Block gained.
+- **Interaction:** Core piece of Exhaust-based [[characters/Ironclad]] builds. Synergizes with [[cards/Corruption]] (all Skills exhaust = free Block), [[cards/Second Wind]], [[cards/Sentinel]], [[cards/True Grit]]. Combined with [[buffs/Barricade]], generates persistent Block rapidly.
ontology/buffs/fire-breathing.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Fire Breathing
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you draw a [[types/Status]] or [[types/Curse]] card, deal N damage to ALL enemies.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Fire Breathing]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 1E), deals 6/10 damage
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple instances stack the damage dealt.
+- **Interaction:** Triggers on draw, not on play. Synergizes with cards that shuffle Statuses into your deck ([[cards/Wild Strike]], [[cards/Reckless Charge]], [[cards/Power Through]]) and with [[buffs/Evolve]] (which draws more when Statuses are drawn, potentially chaining).
ontology/buffs/flame-barrier.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Flame Barrier
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal N damage back to the attacker.
+- **Duration:** Until end of turn (expires at start of next turn)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Flame Barrier]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Skill]], 2E), deals 4/7 damage per attack received, also grants [[buffs/Block]]
+- **Interaction:** Triggers per attack instance, not per hit in a multi-hit attack. If an enemy attacks 5x2, Flame Barrier triggers once (the entire action is one attack). Similar to [[buffs/Thorns]] but temporary and typically higher value.
+- **Note:** Also grants [[buffs/Block]] when played (12/16), making it both offensive and defensive.
ontology/buffs/flight.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Flight
+
+- **Effect:** ALL damage taken is halved (rounded down). Each time the entity takes damage (each hit), Flight decreases by 1. When Flight reaches 0, damage is no longer halved.
+- **Duration:** Reapplied each turn by the enemy ([[enemies/Byrd]]s get Flight 3 each turn at A0)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Byrd]]s (Flight 3/4)
+- **Interaction with multi-hit:** Each hit decrements Flight AND is halved individually. Multi-hit attacks strip Flight faster. A 5x2 attack removes 5 Flight charges while each hit deals 1 damage.
+- **Strategy implication:** Multi-hit attacks ([[cards/Sword Boomerang]], [[cards/Pummel]], [[cards/Dagger Spray]]) strip Flight efficiently. Single large hits are halved wastefully.
ontology/buffs/focus.md
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Focus
+
+- **Effect:** Increases ALL orb passive AND evoke values by N ([[characters/Defect]]-specific)
+- **Duration:** Permanent within combat (unless modified by [[cards/Biased Cognition]] decay or enemy debuffs)
+- **Formula:**
+ - Lightning passive: 3 + Focus damage. Evoke: 8 + Focus damage.
+ - Frost passive: 2 + Focus block. Evoke: 5 + Focus block.
+ - Dark passive: gains 6 + Focus damage per turn. Evoke: accumulated.
+ - Plasma: unaffected by Focus.
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Defragment]] (+1/+2 permanent), [[cards/Consume]] (+2 permanent, lose 1 orb slot), [[relics/Data Disk]] (+1 innate), [[cards/Biased Cognition]] (+4 then -1/turn)
+- **Negative Focus:** Reduces orb values. Applied by [[cards/Biased Cognition]] decay over time.
ontology/buffs/foresight.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Foresight
+
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, Scry N (look at the top N cards of draw pile and optionally discard any of them).
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Foresight]] card ([[characters/Watcher]] [[types/Power]], 1E), Scry 3/4
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple instances increase the Scry amount.
+- **Interaction:** Improves draw quality each turn. Synergizes with cards that benefit from discard or that trigger on Scry.
ontology/buffs/intangible.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Intangible
+
+- **Effect:** Reduce ALL damage taken to 1 (both attacks and non-attack damage)
+- **Duration:** N turns, decrements at start of entity's turn
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Wraith Form]] (3 turns, [[characters/Silent]]), Apparition cards (1 turn each), [[relics/Incense Burner]] (every 6th turn)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Nemesis]] (2 turns, alternating pattern)
+- **Interaction with multi-hit:** Each hit deals 1 damage separately. A 5x6 attack deals 5 damage total (1 per hit).
ontology/buffs/juggernaut.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Juggernaut
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you gain [[buffs/Block]], deal N damage to a random enemy.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Juggernaut]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 2E), deals 5/7 damage per Block gain
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple instances increase damage per trigger.
+- **Interaction:** Triggers on every source of Block gain — cards, [[buffs/Feel No Pain]], [[buffs/Metallicize]], etc. Each separate instance of Block gain triggers it once. Synergizes with [[buffs/Barricade]] builds that generate Block frequently.
ontology/buffs/life-link.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Life Link
+
+- **Effect:** When an entity with Life Link dies, if any other entity with Life Link is still alive, the dead entity revives at half HP at the start of the next turn.
+- **Duration:** Permanent
+- **Requirement:** ALL entities with Life Link must die in the same turn to prevent revival.
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Darkling]]s (3 enemies, all have Life Link)
ontology/buffs/loop.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Loop
+
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, trigger the passive ability of the first Orb N additional times.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Loop]] card ([[characters/Defect]] [[types/Power]], 1E), triggers 1/2 additional times
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple Loops increase the number of additional passive triggers.
+- **Interaction:** Applies to whichever Orb is in the first (leftmost) slot. Lightning passive deals damage, Frost passive gains [[buffs/Block]], Dark passive gains Dark damage. Extremely strong with Frost + [[buffs/Focus]] for repeatable Block generation.
ontology/buffs/malleable.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Malleable
+
+- **Effect:** Each time the entity is attacked within a single turn, gain increasing [[buffs/Block]] (first attack: N block, second: N+1, third: N+2, etc.). Resets at start of entity's turn.
+- **Duration:** Permanent
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Writhing Mass]], [[enemies/Snake Plant]]
+- **Implication:** Multiple small attacks in one turn give increasing block. Single large attacks per turn minimize block gained.
ontology/buffs/mantra.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Mantra
+
+- **Effect:** A resource that accumulates. When reaching 10+, the player enters Divinity stance ([[characters/Watcher]]) and Mantra resets to 0 (keeping overflow).
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Worship]] (+5 Mantra), [[cards/Prostrate]] (+2 Mantra + 4 [[buffs/Block]]), [[cards/Devotion]] ([[types/Power]], +2/3 Mantra per turn), [[relics/Damaru]] (+1 Mantra per turn)
+- **Persistence:** Mantra persists between turns within combat. Does not persist between combats.
+- **Divinity entry:** 10+ Mantra → enter Divinity (triple damage, +3 Energy), Mantra resets. If you had 12 Mantra, you enter Divinity with 2 Mantra remaining.
ontology/buffs/metallicize.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Metallicize
+
+- **Effect:** Gain N [[buffs/Block]] at end of turn (after enemy intent resolves? No — at end of player's turn, before enemy attacks)
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Metallicize]] card (3/4 Block per turn), some enemies have innate Metallicize
+- **Stacking:** Multiple sources stack additively. Two Metallicize = 6/8 Block per turn.
+- **Interaction with [[buffs/Barricade]]:** Block from Metallicize persists between turns if Barricade is active.
+- **NOT modified by [[buffs/Dexterity]]:** Metallicize is not a card play — it's a passive effect. Dexterity does not increase it.
+- **NOT modified by [[debuffs/Frail]]:** Same reason. Frail only affects Block from cards.
ontology/buffs/mode-shift.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Mode Shift
+
+- **Effect:** A damage threshold. When the entity takes cumulative damage exceeding the threshold, it changes mode (attack mode ↔ defensive mode). The threshold resets (higher) each cycle.
+- **Duration:** Permanent, cycles
+- **Thresholds ([[bosses/The Guardian]]):** 30 (first), 40 (second), 50 (third)
+- **Key mechanic:** If the threshold is triggered MID-ATTACK (a multi-hit attack pushes damage past the threshold), the current attack is cancelled.
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/The Guardian]]
ontology/buffs/noxious-fumes.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Noxious Fumes
+
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, apply N [[debuffs/Poison]] to ALL enemies.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Noxious Fumes]] card ([[characters/Silent]] [[types/Power]], 1E), applies 2/3 [[debuffs/Poison]] per turn
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple Noxious Fumes increase Poison applied per turn.
+- **Interaction:** Core scaling tool for Poison builds. Since [[debuffs/Poison]] decreases by 1 each turn, Noxious Fumes counters that decay and provides steady Poison growth. Synergizes with [[cards/Catalyst]] (multiply existing Poison) and [[debuffs/Corpse Explosion]].
ontology/buffs/omega.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Omega
+
+- **Effect:** At the end of each turn, deal 50 damage to ALL enemies.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Omega]] card ([[characters/Watcher]] [[types/Power]], 3E) — obtained only through the [[cards/Alpha]] > Beta > Omega card chain
+- **Interaction:** Extremely powerful but requires setup. [[cards/Alpha]] (1E) shuffles Beta into draw pile; Beta (2E) shuffles Omega into draw pile. The 50 damage is fixed and hits all enemies every turn indefinitely.
ontology/buffs/pen-nib.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Pen Nib
+
+- **Effect:** Every 10th [[types/Attack]] card played deals double damage
+- **Source:** [[relics/Pen Nib]]
+- **Persistence:** Counter tracks across ALL combats (does not reset between fights)
+- **Interaction:** Only counts [[types/Attack]] card plays. [[types/Skill]]s and [[types/Power]]s do not increment the counter.
+- **Activation:** On the 10th Attack, that Attack deals double damage. Counter then resets.
ontology/buffs/plated-armor.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Plated Armor
+
+- **Effect:** Gain N [[buffs/Block]] at end of turn. Decreases by 1 each time the entity takes unblocked HP damage.
+- **Duration:** Permanent until reduced to 0 by taking unblocked damage
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Plated Armor]] card (4/6), some enemies
+- **Key mechanic:** Each instance of unblocked damage removes 1 stack. Multi-hit attacks that break through Block remove 1 stack per hit that reaches HP.
+- **NOT modified by [[buffs/Dexterity]] or [[debuffs/Frail]]:** Passive effect, not a card play.
+- **Difference from [[buffs/Metallicize]]:** Metallicize is permanent. Plated Armor degrades when you take HP damage.
ontology/buffs/rage.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Rage
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play an [[types/Attack]] card, gain N [[buffs/Block]].
+- **Duration:** Until end of turn (expires at start of next turn)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Rage]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Skill]], 0E), grants 3/5 Block per Attack played
+- **Interaction:** Turns every Attack card into a hybrid attack/defense card. Particularly strong in turns where many cheap Attacks are played. Synergizes with [[buffs/Juggernaut]] (each Block gain triggers damage).
ontology/buffs/regeneration.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Regeneration
+
+- **Effect:** At the end of each turn, heal N HP. Regeneration then decreases by 1. Removed when it reaches 0.
+- **Duration:** Decreases by 1 each turn until 0
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Reaper]] card heals based on damage dealt (different mechanic), [[cards/Self Repair]] ([[characters/Defect]]), [[potions/Regen Potion]]
+- **Sources (enemy):** Various enemies/bosses can have Regeneration
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Applying Regen 5 to existing Regen 3 = Regen 8.
+- **Interaction:** Healing occurs at end of turn. Total healing from Regen N = N + (N-1) + ... + 1 = N*(N+1)/2.
ontology/buffs/ritual.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Ritual
+
+- **Effect:** Gain N [[buffs/Strength]] at the start of each turn
+- **Duration:** Permanent (does not decrement)
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Ritual 3 + Ritual 2 = gain 5 [[buffs/Strength]] per turn.
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Cultist]] (gains Ritual 3 via Incantation)
+- **Sources (player):** [[potions/Cultist Potion]] (gain Ritual 1)
ontology/buffs/rupture.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Rupture
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you lose HP from a card YOU play, gain N [[buffs/Strength]].
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Rupture]] card ([[characters/Ironclad]] [[types/Power]], 1E), grants 1/2 [[buffs/Strength]] per trigger
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple Ruptures increase Strength gained per trigger.
+- **Interaction:** Triggers on self-damage from cards like [[cards/Hemokinesis]], [[cards/Offering]], [[cards/Bloodletting]], [[cards/Brutality]], [[cards/Combust]]. Does NOT trigger on enemy damage or [[debuffs/Poison]] damage. Key component of self-damage [[characters/Ironclad]] builds.
ontology/buffs/sadistic-nature.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Sadistic Nature
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, deal N damage to that enemy.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Sadistic Nature]] card ([[characters/Silent]] [[types/Power]], 0E), deals 5/7 damage per debuff applied
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple instances increase damage per debuff application.
+- **Interaction:** Triggers on each debuff application — [[debuffs/Vulnerable]], [[debuffs/Weak]], [[debuffs/Poison]] (each stack counts as one application), etc. Particularly strong with multi-target debuffs ([[cards/Crippling Cloud]]) or frequent debuff application ([[buffs/Noxious Fumes]]).
ontology/buffs/sharp-hide.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Sharp Hide
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever the player plays an [[types/Attack]] card, the player takes N damage
+- **Duration:** Active only during [[bosses/The Guardian]]'s Defensive Mode
+- **Value:** 3 (A0)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/The Guardian]] (Defensive Mode only)
+- **Interaction:** Triggers per [[types/Attack]] card played, not per hit. Multi-hit attacks trigger it once.
ontology/buffs/storm.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Storm
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a [[types/Power]] card, channel 1 Lightning Orb.
+- **Duration:** Permanent ([[types/Power]] effect, lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Storm]] card ([[characters/Defect]] [[types/Power]], 1E / 0E upgraded)
+- **Stacking:** Multiple instances stack. Two Storms = channel 2 Lightning per Power played.
+- **Interaction:** Since Storm itself is a [[types/Power]], playing it with an existing Storm triggers the effect. Synergizes with Power-heavy [[characters/Defect]] builds. Each Lightning channeled benefits from [[buffs/Focus]] for passive damage and evoke damage.
ontology/buffs/strength.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Strength
+
+- **Effect:** Each point adds 1 damage to every [[types/Attack]] card played
+- **Duration:** Permanent within combat, resets to 0 between combats
+- **Exception:** Relic Strength ([[relics/Vajra]] +1) persists across combats
+- **Sources (within combat):** [[cards/Inflame]] (+2), [[cards/Spot Weakness]] (+3/+4), [[cards/Demon Form]] (+2/turn), [[potions/Strength Potion]] (+2), [[cards/Limit Break]] (double current Str)
+- **Negative Strength:** Reduces attack damage by that amount. Applied by [[enemies/Lagavulin]] debuff, [[cards/Disarm]].
ontology/buffs/the-bomb.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# The Bomb
+
+- **Effect:** After 3 turns, deal 40 damage to ALL enemies. Counter decreases by 1 each turn.
+- **Duration:** 3 turns (triggers when counter reaches 0)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/The Bomb]] card (Colorless [[types/Skill]], 2E), available from shops/events
+- **Stacking:** Multiple Bombs track independently. Each has its own 3-turn timer.
+- **Interaction:** Damage is fixed at 40 (50 upgraded) and is dealt at end of the 3rd turn after playing it. Good for long fights where you can survive 3 turns. Unaffected by [[buffs/Strength]].
ontology/buffs/thorns.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Thorns
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever the entity is attacked, deal N damage back to the attacker
+- **Duration:** Permanent (does not decrement)
+- **Sources (player):** [[relics/Bronze Scales]] (3 Thorns), [[buffs/Flame Barrier]] (temporary, 4/6 per turn)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Spiker]] (starts with Thorns 3, gains more each turn)
+- **Interaction with multi-hit:** Triggers once per hit. A 3x4 attack against Thorns 3 = 9 counter damage.
+- **Ignores block:** Thorns damage bypasses the attacker's [[buffs/Block]].
ontology/cards/a-thousand-cuts.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# A Thousand Cuts
+
+- **Cost:** 2E
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a card, deal 1 damage to ALL enemies
+- **Upgraded:** Deal 2 damage to ALL enemies
ontology/cards/accuracy.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Accuracy
+
+- **Cost:** 1E (0E upgraded)
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Your Shivs deal 4 additional damage
+- **Upgraded:** Costs 0E, Shivs deal 6 additional damage
ontology/cards/acrobatics.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Acrobatics
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Draw 3 cards, discard 1 card
+- **Upgraded:** Draw 4 cards, discard 1 card
ontology/cards/adrenaline.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Adrenaline
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Keywords:** Exhaust
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 Energy, draw 2 cards, Exhaust
+- **Upgraded:** Gain 2 Energy, draw 2 cards, Exhaust
ontology/cards/after-image.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# After Image
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a card, gain 1 block
+- **Upgraded:** Innate; whenever you play a card, gain 1 block
ontology/cards/aggregate.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Aggregate
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain Energy equal to floor(cards in draw pile / 4)
+- **Upgraded:** Gain Energy equal to floor(cards in draw pile / 3)
ontology/cards/all-for-one.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# All for One
+
+- **Cost:** 2E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** 10 damage, put all 0-cost cards from your discard pile into your hand
+- **Upgraded:** 14 damage
ontology/cards/all-out-attack.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# All-Out Attack
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** 10 damage to ALL enemies, discard 1 card at random
+- **Upgraded:** 14 damage to ALL enemies, discard 1 card at random
ontology/cards/alpha.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Alpha
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Watcher
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Keywords:** Exhaust
+- **Effect:** Shuffle a Beta into your draw pile, Exhaust
+- **Upgraded:** Innate, shuffle a Beta into your draw pile, Exhaust
ontology/cards/amplify.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Amplify
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Your next Power card this turn is played twice
+- **Upgraded:** Your next 2 Power cards this turn are played twice
ontology/cards/anger.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Anger
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 6 damage, add a copy of Anger to discard pile
+- **Upgraded:** 8 damage, add a copy of Anger to discard pile
ontology/cards/apotheosis.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Apotheosis
+
+- **Cost:** 2E (1E upgraded)
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Colorless
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Upgrade ALL cards in hand, draw pile, and discard pile for this combat, Exhaust
+- **Upgraded:** Costs 1E, Exhaust
ontology/cards/armaments.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Armaments
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 5 block, upgrade a card in hand for this combat
+- **Upgraded:** 5 block, upgrade ALL cards in hand for this combat
ontology/cards/auto-shields.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Auto-Shields
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** If you have no Block, gain 11 Block
+- **Upgraded:** 15 Block
ontology/cards/backflip.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Backflip
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 5 block, draw 2 cards
+- **Upgraded:** 8 block, draw 2 cards
ontology/cards/backstab.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Backstab
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Keywords:** Innate, Exhaust
+- **Effect:** 11 damage, Innate, Exhaust
+- **Upgraded:** 15 damage
ontology/cards/ball-lightning.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Ball Lightning
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 7 damage, channel 1 Lightning orb
+- **Upgraded:** 10 damage
ontology/cards/bandage-up.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Bandage Up
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Colorless
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Keywords:** Exhaust
+- **Effect:** Heal 4 HP, Exhaust
+- **Upgraded:** Heal 6 HP, Exhaust
ontology/cards/bane.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Bane
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Silent
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 7 damage; if enemy is Poisoned, deal 7 damage again
+- **Upgraded:** 10 damage; if enemy is Poisoned, deal 10 damage again
ontology/cards/barrage.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Barrage
+
+- **Cost:** 2E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Deal 4 damage per channeled orb to a target enemy
+- **Upgraded:** Deal 6 damage per channeled orb
ontology/cards/barricade.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Barricade
+
+- **Cost:** 3E (2E upgraded)
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Block is not removed at the start of your turn
+- **Upgraded:** Costs 2E
ontology/cards/bash.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Bash
+
+- **Cost:** 2E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Starter
+- **Effect:** 8 damage, apply 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]
+- **Upgraded:** 10 damage, apply 3 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]
ontology/cards/battle-hymn.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Battle Hymn
+
+- **Cost:** 1E
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Watcher
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, add a Smite to your hand
+- **Upgraded:** Innate
ontology/cards/battle-trance.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Battle Trance
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Draw 3 cards, you cannot draw additional cards this turn
+- **Upgraded:** Draw 4 cards, you cannot draw additional cards this turn
ontology/cards/beam-cell.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Beam Cell
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Attack]]
+- **Character:** Defect
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** 3 damage, apply 1 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]
+- **Upgraded:** 4 damage, apply 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]
ontology/cards/berserk.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Berserk
+
+- **Cost:** 0E
+- **Type:** [[types/Power]]
+- **Character:** Ironclad
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon

+# Zap
+

+- **Type:** [[types/Skill]]
+- **Character:** Defect

ontology/characters/defect.md
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+# Defect
+
+## Orb Mechanics
+
+The Defect channels orbs into orb slots. Orbs provide passive effects at end of turn and stronger evoke effects when removed.
+
+### Orb Types
+
+| Orb | Passive (end of turn) | Evoke (when removed) |
+|---|---|---|
+| **Lightning** | 3 damage to random enemy | 8 damage to random enemy |
+| **Frost** | 2 block | 5 block |
+| **Dark** | Gains 6 + Focus damage each turn | Deals accumulated damage to lowest HP enemy |
+| **Plasma** | Gain 1 Energy | Gain 2 Energy |
+
+### Channeling and Evoking
+
+- **Channel:** Add an orb to the rightmost empty slot. If all slots full, the leftmost orb is evoked to make room.
+- **Evoke:** Remove the frontmost (leftmost) orb, triggering its evoke effect.
+- **Dualcast:** Evokes the front orb twice (1E).
+- **Orb Slots:** Starts with 3. Capacitor adds more. More slots = more passive effects per turn.
+
+### Focus
+
+Core scaling stat for orbs. Each point of Focus increases ALL orb passive AND evoke values.
+
+- Lightning with Focus 2: passive = 5 damage, evoke = 10 damage
+- Frost with Focus 2: passive = 4 block, evoke = 7 block
+- Sources: Defragment (+1 permanent), Consume (+2 but lose 1 slot), Data Disk relic (+1 innate)
+
+## Starting Deck
+
+- 4 Strike (Attack, 1E, 6 damage)
+- 4 Defend (Skill, 1E, 5 block)
+- 1 Zap (Skill, 0E, Channel 1 Lightning)
+- 1 Dualcast (Skill, 1E, Evoke front orb twice)
+
+Skill-to-Attack ratio: 6 Skills vs 4 Attacks.
+
+## Starting Relic
+
+**Cracked Core** — channels 1 Lightning orb at the start of each combat.
ontology/characters/ironclad.md
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Ironclad
+
+## Starting Deck
+
+- 5 Strike (Attack, 1E, 6 damage)
+- 4 Defend (Skill, 1E, 5 block)
+- 1 Bash (Attack, 2E, 8 damage, apply Vulnerable 2)
+
+## Starting Relic
+
+**Burning Blood** — heal 6 HP at the end of every combat.
+
+## Unique Mechanics
+
+None. The Ironclad has no unique combat system (unlike Defect orbs or Watcher stances). Card pools emphasize Strength scaling, exhaust synergies, self-damage trades, and HP recovery.
ontology/characters/silent.md
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# Silent
+
+## Starting Deck
+
+- 5 Strike (Attack, 1E, 6 damage)
+- 5 Defend (Skill, 1E, 5 block)
+- 1 Survivor (Skill, 1E, 8 block, discard 1 card)
+- 1 Neutralize (Attack, 0E, 3 damage, apply Weak 1)
+
+## Starting Relic
+
+**Ring of the Snake** — draw 2 additional cards on Turn 1 (7 cards instead of 5).
+
+## Key Mechanics
+
+- **Poison:** Applied to enemies, deals its value as damage at start of their turn, then decreases by 1. Stacks additively.
+- **Shivs:** 0-cost Attack cards that deal 4 damage (6 with Accuracy). Generated by Blade Dance, Cloak and Dagger, Infinite Blades, Storm of Steel. Exhaust after playing.
+- **Discard synergies:** Some cards trigger effects when discarded (Tactician: gain Energy, Reflex: draw cards).
ontology/characters/watcher.md
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Watcher
+
+## Stances
+
+The Watcher has four stances. Only one can be active at a time. Entering a new stance replaces the current stance.
+
+| Stance | Effect | Entry Cards | Exit |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| **Wrath** | ALL attack damage dealt is DOUBLED. ALL damage received is DOUBLED. | Eruption, Crescendo, Fear No Evil (conditional) | Enter Calm, enter Divinity, or Empty Body (No Stance) |
+| **Calm** | No combat bonuses. When leaving Calm, gain +2 Energy. | Vigilance, Inner Peace, Meditate, Fear No Evil (conditional) | Enter Wrath, enter Divinity, or Empty Body |
+| **Divinity** | ALL attack damage dealt is TRIPLED. Gain +3 Energy on entry. Exits automatically at end of turn. | Accumulate 10+ Mantra (Worship, Prostrate, Devotion, Damaru) | Automatic at end of turn (returns to No Stance) |
+| **No Stance** | Neutral. No bonuses or penalties. Starting stance. | Empty Body, or after Divinity ends, or at combat start | Any stance-entry card |
+
+### Stance Change Triggers
+
+When the Watcher changes stance (enters a new stance from a different one), certain cards trigger:
+- **Flurry of Blows:** Returns from discard pile to hand on any stance change
+- **Rushdown:** Draw 2 (or 3 upgraded) cards on entering Wrath
+- **Mental Fortress:** Gain 4 (or 6 upgraded) block on any stance change
+
+### Energy Loop Mechanics
+
+Leaving Calm grants +2 Energy. Eruption costs 2E (1E upgraded). Therefore:
+- Eruption from Calm: spend 2E, gain 2E = net 0E cost + enter Wrath
+- Eruption+ from Calm: spend 1E, gain 2E = net +1E + enter Wrath
+
+## Starting Deck
+
+- 4 Strike (Attack, 1E, 6 damage)
+- 4 Defend (Skill, 1E, 5 block)
+- 1 Eruption (Attack, 2E, 9 damage, enter Wrath)
+- 1 Vigilance (Skill, 2E, 8 block, enter Calm)
+
+## Starting Relic
+
+**Pure Water** — adds 1 Miracle to hand at the start of each combat. Miracle: 0E Skill, Retain, gain 1 Energy, Exhaust.
ontology/debuffs/constricted.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Constricted
+
+- **Effect:** Take N damage at the end of each turn (unblockable — directly reduces HP past [[buffs/Block]]).
+- **Duration:** Permanent unless removed
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple applications increase the damage per turn.
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Bronze Automaton]] (Constrict attack applies it), [[enemies/Giant Head]]
+- **Interaction:** Cannot be blocked — it bypasses [[buffs/Block]] entirely. Can be prevented by [[buffs/Buffer]]. [[buffs/Artifact]] does NOT prevent it (it's applied via an attack, not as a standalone debuff application in all cases — but the debuff itself is negatable by [[buffs/Artifact]] when applied).
ontology/debuffs/corpse-explosion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Corpse Explosion
+
+- **Effect:** When the afflicted enemy dies, deal damage equal to its Max HP to ALL other enemies.
+- **Duration:** Permanent (persists until the enemy dies)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Corpse Explosion]] card ([[characters/Silent]] [[types/Skill]], 2E), applies [[debuffs/Poison]] and this debuff
+- **Stacking:** Multiple applications do NOT stack — only one instance is meaningful per enemy.
+- **Strategy implication:** Extremely powerful in multi-enemy fights. Kill the weakest enemy first to chain AoE damage. Particularly strong against enemies with high Max HP in groups.
ontology/debuffs/draw-reduction.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Draw Reduction
+
+- **Effect:** Draw N fewer cards at the start of next turn. Removed after taking effect.
+- **Duration:** 1 turn (applied this turn, takes effect next turn, then removed)
+- **Sources (enemy):** Various enemies apply this as part of their attacks or abilities
+- **Sources (player):** Some card downsides (e.g., [[cards/Scrape]] if conditions not met)
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Multiple applications reduce draw further.
+- **Interaction:** Only reduces the base draw (default 5). Cannot reduce draw below 0.
ontology/debuffs/entangled.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Entangled
+
+- **Effect:** Cannot play [[types/Attack]] cards for the rest of this turn.
+- **Duration:** Until end of current turn (removed at start of next turn)
+- **Sources (enemy):** Slavers ([[enemies/Blue Slaver]]'s net attack), [[enemies/Book of Stabbing]]
+- **Interaction:** Only restricts [[types/Attack]] cards. [[types/Skill]]s, [[types/Power]]s, and other card types can still be played. [[buffs/Artifact]] negates the application of Entangled.
ontology/debuffs/frail.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Frail
+
+- **Effect:** [[buffs/Block]] gained from cards is reduced by 25% (x0.75 multiplier)
+- **Duration:** N turns, decrements at start of player's turn
+- **Formula:** `floor(block * 0.75)`. [[cards/Defend]] 5 → 3. [[cards/Shrug It Off]] 8 → 6.
+- **Scope:** Only affects block from card plays. Does not affect block from relics ([[buffs/Metallicize]]), orbs (Frost passive), or other non-card sources.
ontology/debuffs/hex.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Hex
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a non-[[types/Attack]] card, add a Dazed ([[types/Status]]) to your draw pile.
+- **Duration:** Permanent (lasts rest of combat unless cleansed)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Hexaghost]] (applies Hex via Inferno)
+- **Interaction:** Punishes playing [[types/Skill]]s and [[types/Power]]s. Dazed is an unplayable [[types/Status]] that clogs hand slots. Particularly dangerous in Power-heavy or Skill-heavy decks. [[types/Attack]]-focused builds are less affected.
+- **Removal:** Can be removed by [[buffs/Artifact]] (prevents application) but once applied, cannot be cleansed mid-combat.
ontology/debuffs/lock-on.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Lock-On
+
+- **Effect:** The afflicted enemy takes 50% more damage from Orb attacks (Lightning, Dark, Frost passive does not deal damage so not affected).
+- **Duration:** Decreases by 1 each turn
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Bullseye]] card ([[characters/Defect]] [[types/Attack]]), [[cards/All For One]] interactions
+- **Stacking:** Duration stacks (lasts more turns), but the 50% bonus does not increase beyond 50%.
+- **Interaction:** Only affects Orb damage (Lightning evoke/passive, Dark evoke). Does NOT affect card damage. Core debuff for Orb-focused [[characters/Defect]] builds.
ontology/debuffs/mark.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Mark
+
+- **Effect:** When Mark is applied to an enemy that already has Mark, that enemy takes damage equal to their current Mark stacks (before the new stacks are added).
+- **Duration:** Permanent (does not decrement)
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Each application adds stacks AND triggers damage equal to existing stacks.
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Pressure Points]] card ([[characters/Watcher]] [[types/Skill]], 1E), applies 8/11 Mark
+- **Interaction:** Scales quadratically — the more Mark already on an enemy, the more damage each new application deals. Bypasses [[buffs/Block]] (deals HP loss directly). Works across multiple enemies independently.
ontology/debuffs/painful-stabs.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Painful Stabs
+
+- **Effect:** Whenever you lose HP from an attack, add a Wound ([[types/Status]]) to your discard pile.
+- **Duration:** Permanent (lasts rest of combat)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[enemies/Book of Stabbing]]
+- **Interaction:** Wounds are unplayable [[types/Status]] cards that clog your hand. Punishes taking unblocked damage. [[buffs/Block]] fully negating an attack prevents the trigger. Multi-hit attacks that partially connect can add multiple Wounds.
ontology/debuffs/poison.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Poison
+
+- **Effect:** At the start of the poisoned entity's turn, lose HP equal to Poison stacks. Then Poison decreases by 1.
+- **Duration:** Decreases by 1 each turn, persists until 0
+- **Stacking:** Additive. Applying 3 Poison to an enemy with 5 Poison = 8 Poison.
+- **Damage sequence:** Poison 7 deals 7+6+5+4+3+2+1 = 28 total damage over 7 turns.
+- **Sources:** [[cards/Deadly Poison]], [[cards/Noxious Fumes]] ([[types/Power]], applies each turn), [[cards/Poisoned Stab]], [[cards/Bouncing Flask]], [[cards/Crippling Cloud]], [[cards/Bane]] (bonus damage if target is poisoned), [[cards/Corpse Explosion]], [[cards/Envenom]]
+- **Scaling:** [[cards/Catalyst]] doubles (or triples upgraded) current Poison stacks. [[debuffs/Corpse Explosion]] makes enemies deal AoE damage on death equal to their HP.
+- **Key property:** Poison ignores [[buffs/Block]]. It deals damage directly to HP.
ontology/debuffs/slow.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Slow
+
+- **Effect:** The afflicted enemy takes 10% more damage for each card you play this turn. Resets at start of each turn.
+- **Duration:** Permanent (does not decrement)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/The Guardian]], [[enemies/Lagavulin]], [[bosses/Time Eater]] — these enemies have Slow as an innate mechanic applied to themselves (it's actually a debuff the player benefits from)
+- **Interaction:** Stacks multiplicatively with [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]. Playing many cheap cards maximizes the damage bonus. After 5 cards played, the enemy takes 50% more damage. Strongly rewards low-cost card-heavy decks.
ontology/debuffs/split.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Split
+
+- **Effect:** When the enemy's HP drops to half or below, it dies and spawns two smaller versions of itself.
+- **Duration:** One-time trigger
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Slime Boss]] (splits into 2 Large Slimes at 50% HP), [[enemies/Acid Slime L]] and [[enemies/Spike Slime L]] (split into 2 medium slimes)
+- **Strategy implication:** Overkill damage is wasted. Ideally deal exactly enough damage to trigger the split, then handle the spawns. AoE damage becomes very valuable after the split occurs. The spawned slimes inherit [[debuffs/Poison]] stacks proportionally.
ontology/debuffs/stasis.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Stasis
+
+- **Effect:** An Orb slot is occupied by a stolen card. The card is returned to your hand when the enemy holding it dies.
+- **Duration:** Until the enemy dies
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Bronze Automaton]] (steals a card from your hand and places it in Stasis)
+- **Interaction:** Reduces available Orb slots for the [[characters/Defect]]. The stolen card is unavailable until the Automaton is defeated. If fighting [[bosses/Bronze Automaton]] as [[characters/Defect]], losing an Orb slot reduces [[buffs/Focus]] value and Orb cycling efficiency.
ontology/debuffs/time-warp.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Time Warp
+
+- **Effect:** Tracks cards played by the player. After 12 cards are played in a single turn, the enemy gains 2 [[buffs/Strength]] and the player's turn ends immediately.
+- **Duration:** Permanent (resets counter each turn)
+- **Sources (enemy):** [[bosses/Time Eater]]
+- **Interaction:** Hard-counters decks that play many cards per turn (Shiv decks, 0-cost spam, infinite combos). Forces the player to be strategic about card count per turn. The 12-card limit includes ALL card plays ([[types/Attack]]s, [[types/Skill]]s, [[types/Power]]s). The [[buffs/Strength]] gain is permanent and cumulative across multiple triggers.
ontology/debuffs/vulnerable.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Vulnerable
+
+- **Effect:** Target takes 50% more damage from [[types/Attack]]s (x1.5 multiplier)
+- **Duration:** N turns, decrements at start of affected entity's turn
+- **Direction:** Vulnerable on enemy = player's attacks deal 50% more to that enemy. Vulnerable on player = enemy attacks deal 50% more to player.
+- **Removed by:** [[buffs/Artifact]] (negates the application)
ontology/debuffs/weak.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Weak
+
+- **Effect:** Affected entity deals 25% less attack damage (x0.75 multiplier)
+- **Duration:** N turns, decrements at start of affected entity's turn
+- **Formula:** `floor((base + strength) * 0.75)` — [[buffs/Strength]] is added BEFORE the Weak multiplier
+- **Direction:** Weak on enemy = their attacks deal 25% less, player's attacks are UNAFFECTED. Weak on player = player's attacks deal 25% less.
+- **Removed by:** [[buffs/Artifact]] (negates the application)
+
+Applying Weak to an enemy does NOT reduce the player's own damage. The 0.75 multiplier applies only to the Weakened entity's own attacks.
ontology/debuffs/wraith-form.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Wraith Form
+
+- **Effect:** Gain N stacks of [[buffs/Intangible]]. At the start of each subsequent turn, lose 1 [[buffs/Dexterity]].
+- **Duration:** The [[buffs/Dexterity]] loss is permanent (stacks each turn for rest of combat)
+- **Sources (player):** [[cards/Wraith Form]] card ([[characters/Silent]] [[types/Power]], 3E), grants 2/3 [[buffs/Intangible]]
+- **Interaction:** Extremely powerful but with severe downside. [[buffs/Intangible]] reduces ALL damage to 1 for N turns, but the cumulative [[buffs/Dexterity]] loss makes [[buffs/Block]] generation increasingly difficult after Intangible expires. Often a "win within N turns or lose" card. [[buffs/Artifact]] does NOT prevent the Dexterity loss (it's a self-applied effect from a [[types/Power]] you control).
ontology/encounters/2-fungi-beasts.md
