ontology/enemies/acid-slime-l.md
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Acid Slime L
+
+- **Type:** Hallway / Boss split
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 65-69 standalone, or equal to Slime Boss's remaining HP at split
+
+## Pattern
+
+30% Corrosive Spit, 40% Tackle, 30% Lick. Cannot use Tackle twice in a row; other moves cannot repeat three times in a row. Splits into 2x Acid Slime (M) when HP drops to 50% or below.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Corrosive Spit | 11 (12 at A2) | Adds 2 Slimed cards to discard pile |
+| Tackle | 16 (18 at A2) | -- |
+| Lick | -- | Applies 2 Weak |
+| Split | -- | At 50% HP or below, spawns 2 Acid Slime (M) with current HP each |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Split at 50% HP:** Creates 2 Acid Slime (M) enemies with current HP each.
+
+**Weak 2:** Reduces player damage output by 25% for 2 turns.
ontology/enemies/acid-slime-m.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Acid Slime M
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 28-32
+
+## Pattern
+
+30% Corrosive Spit, 30% Tackle, 40% Lick. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Corrosive Spit | 7 (8 at A2) | Add 1 Slimed to discard pile |
+| Tackle | 10 (12 at A2) | -- |
+| Lick | -- | Apply 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Has [[debuffs/Split]]: at half HP or below, dies and spawns 2x [[enemies/Acid Slime S]]
ontology/enemies/acid-slime-s.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Acid Slime S
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 8-12
+
+## Pattern
+
+50% Tackle, 50% Lick. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Tackle | 3 (4 at A2) | -- |
+| Lick | -- | Apply 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Produced by [[enemies/Acid Slime M]] (via [[debuffs/Split]]) or appears directly in small slime encounters
+- Low threat individually but appear in groups
ontology/enemies/blue-slaver.md
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Blue Slaver
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 46-50
+
+## Pattern
+
+Each turn, 60% chance to use Stab, 40% chance to use Rake. Cannot use the same attack three times in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 12 (13 at A2) | -- |
+| Rake | 7 (8 at A2) | Applies 1 Weak |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Weak Application:** Rake applies 1 Weak, reducing player damage output by 25% for 1 turn. No free turns -- attacks every turn.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Solo in Act 1 Hard Pool. Also appears in the Act 2 Slavers elite (alongside Red Slaver + Taskmaster).
ontology/enemies/book-of-stabbing.md
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Book of Stabbing
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 160-164
+
+## Pattern
+
+85% Multi Stab, 15% Single Stab. Cannot use Multi Stab 3x in a row or Single Stab 2x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Multi Stab | 6xN (N = times used + 2). Turn 1: 6x2=12, Turn 2: 6x3=18, Turn 3: 6x4=24, Turn 4: 6x5=30, Turn 5: 6x6=36 | (7xN at A3) |
+| Single Stab | 21 (24 at A3) | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Escalating Multi Stab:** Multi Stab gains +1 hit every time it is used. The scaling is from hit count increasing. Each Multi Stab adds more hits: 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 6.
+
+**Painful Stabs:** Whenever the player receives attack damage, adds Wounds to discard pile. Wounds are Unplayable status cards that clog the deck.
+
+**Wound Clog:** By turn 6-7, Wounds can comprise 60%+ of the deck. A 21-card deck accumulating 3+ Wounds per turn means by mid-fight, draws are 3 Wounds and 2 playable cards per turn.
ontology/enemies/byrd.md
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# Byrd
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 25-31 each (appears in groups of 3)
+
+## Pattern (while airborne)
+
+50% Peck (1x5 damage), 30% Caw (+1 Strength), 20% Swoop (12 damage). Cannot use Caw or Swoop twice in a row. Cannot use Peck three times in a row.
+
+## When Grounded (Flight removed)
+
+Stunned -> Headbutt (3 damage) -> Go Airborne (gains 3 Flying) -> returns to normal pattern.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Peck | 1x5 = 5 | Each hit is 1 |
+| Swoop | 12 | -- |
+| Caw | -- | Gains 1 Strength |
+| Headbutt | 3 | Only when grounded |
+| Go Airborne | -- | Gains 3 Flying |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Flight 3:** Takes 50% less attack damage while Flying. Each attack hit removes 1 Flight charge. Resets at start of next turn if not fully removed. Multi-hit and AOE attacks strip Flight faster. Indirect damage (poison, orbs) ignores Flight entirely.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Can appear alongside Chosen (Chosen+Byrd fight), combining Flight mechanics with Hex.
ontology/enemies/centurion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Centurion
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 76-80
+
+## Pattern
+
+**While [[enemies/Mystic]] alive:** 65% Slash, 35% Protect. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+**After [[enemies/Mystic]] dies:** 65% Slash, 35% Fury. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Slash | 12 | -- |
+| Protect | -- | Gives [[enemies/Mystic]] 15 [[buffs/Block]] |
+| Fury | 6x3 | Only used after [[enemies/Mystic]] dies |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Mode shift when [[enemies/Mystic]] dies: replaces Protect with Fury (multi-hit)
ontology/enemies/chosen.md
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Chosen
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 95-99
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Poke, then Hex. After that, repeats: (Debilitate 50% / Drain 50%) followed by (Poke 60% / Zap 40%).
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Poke | 5x2 = 10 (6x2 = 12 at A2) | -- |
+| Zap | 18 (21 at A2) | -- |
+| Debilitate | 10 (12 at A2) | Applies 2 Vulnerable |
+| Drain | -- | Applies 3 Weak + gains 3 Strength |
+| Hex | -- | Applies Hex debuff |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Hex:** Whenever the player plays a non-Attack card, shuffle 1 Dazed into draw pile. Lasts rest of combat. Applied on Turn 2. Powers do NOT trigger Hex. Attacks are safe.
+
+**Drain Strength Scaling:** Each Drain gives +3 Str. With Vulnerable on the player, even base Poke (5x2) becomes dangerous over time.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Paired with Cultist in Act 2 hallway fights. Can appear with Byrds (Chosen+Byrd fight).
ontology/enemies/cultist.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Cultist
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 48-54
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Incantation (gains 3 Ritual, does NOT attack). Subsequent turns: uses Dark Strike every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Incantation | -- | Gains Ritual 3 |
+| Dark Strike | 6 (base, +3 per turn from Ritual) | -- |
+
+Damage by turn: Turn 2: 9. Turn 3: 12. Turn 4: 15. Turn 5: 18.
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Ritual 3:** Gains +3 Strength per turn permanently. Turn 1 is completely free (no attack).
+
+## Act 2 Appearances
+
+Cultist appears paired with Chosen in Act 2 hallway fights. In this pairing, Cultist still buffs Turn 1 (free).
ontology/enemies/dagger.md
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Dagger
+
+- **Type:** Elite (summon)
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 20-25
+
+## Pattern
+
+Attacks every turn with Stab.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 9 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Summoned by [[enemies/Reptomancer]] (starts with 2, summons more when killed)
+- Kill to reduce incoming damage, but Reptomancer will resummon
ontology/enemies/darkling.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Darkling
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 48-56
+
+## Pattern
+
+**Outer Darklings:** Turn 1: 50/50 Nip or Harden. Other turns: 30% Nip, 40% Chomp, 30% Harden. Cannot use Harden or Chomp consecutively. Nip cannot repeat 3x.
+**Middle Darkling:** Same but cannot use Chomp.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Nip | 7-11 (random, set at combat start) | -- |
+| Chomp | 8x2 | Outer only |
+| Harden | -- | Gain 12 [[buffs/Block]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Has [[buffs/Life Link]]: must kill all Darklings in the same turn or dead ones revive at 50% HP next turn
ontology/enemies/exploder.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Exploder
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 30
+
+## Pattern
+
+Fixed sequence: Slam -> Slam -> Explode. Uses Slam twice, then detonates on Turn 3. The Explosive timer starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at end of each turn. When it reaches 0, Exploder uses Explode and dies.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Slam | 9 (11 at A2) | -- |
+| Explode | 30 | Kills self |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Explosive 3 (countdown timer):** Decreases by 1 each turn. At 0, Exploder detonates for 30 damage and dies. Hard timer -- 2 turns to kill or take 30 damage.
+
+**Explosion does NOT ignore block.** Can be blocked if you cannot kill in time.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Appears with other Shapes (Spikers, Repulsors) in the 3 Shapes encounter.
ontology/enemies/fat-gremlin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Fat Gremlin
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 13-17
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Smash every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Smash | 4 | Apply 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] |
ontology/enemies/fungi-beast.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Fungi Beast
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1-2
+- **HP:** 22-28 (appears in pairs or with Shelled Parasite)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Each turn, 60% chance Bite, 40% chance Grow. Cannot use Bite 3 times in a row. Cannot use Grow twice in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bite | 6 (base, scales with Strength) | -- |
+| Grow | -- | Gains 3 Strength |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Strength Scaling (+3 per Grow):** After 1 Grow = 9 Bite, after 2 Grows = 12 Bite, after 3 Grows = 15 Bite. Two Fungi Beasts attacking same turn deal combined 18 (early) to 27+ (late).
+
+**Spore Cloud 2:** On death, applies 2 Vulnerable to player.
+
+## Act 2 Pairing
+
+Appears with Shelled Parasite in Act 2. Fungi Beast's Spore Cloud applies Vulnerable, which makes Shelled Parasite's 13+ damage attacks hit for 19+.
ontology/enemies/giant-head.md
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# Giant Head
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 500
+
+## Pattern
+
+For the first 4 turns, uses Count (13 damage) or Glare (1 Weak) with 50/50 chance (cannot repeat either 3x in a row). After 4 turns, exclusively uses "It Is Time" for the rest of combat.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Count | 13 | -- |
+| Glare | -- | Applies 1 Weak |
+| It Is Time | 30 (base, increases by 5 per use: 30 -> 35 -> 40 -> 45 -> 50 -> 55 -> 60 max) | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Slow:** Whenever the player plays a card, the Giant Head receives 10% more damage from Attacks this turn. This REWARDS playing many cards per turn -- more plays = more damage dealt to it.
+
+**It Is Time Escalation:** After 4 turns, every subsequent turn deals 30+ and growing (+5 per use). The fight is a DPS race -- kill before it reaches 50+.
+
+**Metallicize 8:** Gains 8 Block per turn passively.
+
+**Fight Length:** 10+ turns at 500 HP.
ontology/enemies/green-louse.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Green Louse
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 11-17
+
+## Pattern
+
+75% Bite, 25% Spit Web. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bite | 5-7 (random, set at combat start) | -- |
+| Spit Web | -- | Apply 2 [[debuffs/Weak]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Has [[buffs/Curl Up]]: gains 3-7 [[buffs/Block]] when first hit by an attack
+- Spit Web reduces player damage output by 25%
ontology/enemies/gremlin-leader.md
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+# Gremlin Leader
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 140-148 (A0), 145-155 (A8)
+
+Starts with 2 gremlins already present. Maximum 3 small gremlins active at a time.
+
+## Pattern
+
+Move selection depends on gremlin count:
+- 0 gremlins: Rally! 75% / Stab 25%
+- 1 gremlin (last was Encourage): Rally! 50% / Stab 50%
+- 1 gremlin (last was Stab): Rally! 62.5% / Encourage 37.5%
+- 2+ gremlins: Encourage 66% / Stab 34%
+
+Cannot use any intent twice in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 6x3 = 18 | -- |
+| Encourage | -- | All enemies gain 3 Strength + other gremlins gain 6 Block (Str scales to 4-5, Block to 10-18 at higher Ascensions) |
+| Rally! | -- | Summons 2 random Gremlins |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Rally Strength Scaling:** Encourage gives +3 Str to ALL enemies (Leader + all gremlins). Permanent and stacking. Fires roughly every other turn.
+
+**Rally Scaling Math:**
+- Turn 3: all enemies have +3 Str
+- Turn 5: all enemies have +6 Str
+- Turn 7: all enemies have +9 Str
+- With 2 gremlins alive at +9 Str, gremlins alone deal (9+9)*2 = 36, plus Leader's own attacks. Total incoming by turn 7-8 exceeds 50/turn.
+
+**Gremlin Respawn:** Leader re-summons gremlins when they die -- killing gremlins is temporary relief, not permanent removal.
+
+**Gremlin Wizard:** If present, charges for a massive 28-damage nuke. Must be killed before it fires.
ontology/enemies/gremlin-nob.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Gremlin Nob
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 82-86 (A0), 85-90 (A8)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always opens with Bellow. After Bellow: 33% Skull Bash, 67% Rush. Cannot use Rush three times in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bellow | — | Gains Enrage 2 |
+| Skull Bash | 6 (8 at A2) | Apply 2 Vulnerable |
+| Rush | 14 (16 at A2) | — |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Enrage 2:** Whenever the player plays a Skill card, Nob gains +2 Strength permanently. Powers do NOT trigger Enrage. Skills played before Bellow (Turn 1) do NOT trigger Enrage because Enrage is not yet active.
ontology/enemies/gremlin-wizard.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Gremlin Wizard
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 21-25
+
+## Pattern
+
+Charges for 2 turns (no damage), then Ultimate Blast. After first blast, charges for 3 turns before each subsequent blast.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Charging | -- | No effect (telegraph) |
+| Ultimate Blast | 25 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Extremely dangerous if left alive — 25 damage is nearly lethal in Act 1
+- Kill priority: before first Ultimate Blast fires (2 turns to kill)
ontology/enemies/jaw-worm.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Jaw Worm
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 40-44
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Chomp. After Chomp: 59% Bellow, 41% Thrash. After Bellow: 56% Thrash, 44% Chomp. After Thrash: 45% Bellow, 30% Thrash, 25% Chomp (if Thrash used twice in a row: 64% Bellow, 36% Chomp).
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Chomp | 11 (12 at A2) | -- |
+| Bellow | -- | Gains 3 Strength + 6 Block (4 Str at A2, 5 Str + 9 Block at A17) |
+| Thrash | 7 + 5 Block | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Strength Scaling:** Each Bellow gives +3 Str and 6 Block. Damage increases each turn the fight goes on. Turn 1 is always Chomp (11 damage). Turn 2 is likely Bellow (free turn, 0 damage).
ontology/enemies/lagavulin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Lagavulin
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 109-111 (A0), 112-115 (A8)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Starts asleep with Metallicize 8 (gains 8 Block every turn). Wakes when it takes any damage (stunned for 1 turn, then attacks) or after 3 turns of no damage (immediately attacks). After waking, Metallicize is removed. Repeating cycle: Attack -> Attack -> Siphon Soul.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Attack | 18 (20 at A3) | -- |
+| Siphon Soul | -- | Applies -1 Strength and -1 Dexterity permanently (-2 each at A18) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Metallicize 8 (while asleep):** Gains 8 Block every turn while sleeping. Removed upon waking.
+
+**Siphon Soul:** Permanent -1 Str/-1 Dex debuffs. These stack and never go away. Each Siphon Soul makes all player attacks and block cards permanently worse. After 2+ debuff turns, recalculate all damage values: Strike goes from 6 to 5 to 4.
ontology/enemies/looter.md
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+# Looter
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 44-48
+
+## Pattern
+
+Turns 1-2: Mug (10 damage + steals gold). Turn 3+: 50% Lunge (12 damage) or 50% Smoke Bomb (6 Block). After Smoke Bomb, uses Escape next turn (flees with stolen gold, combat ends). If Lunge on Turn 3, Smoke Bomb follows on Turn 4, then Escape Turn 5.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Mug | 10 | Steals gold |
+| Lunge | 12 | -- |
+| Smoke Bomb | -- | Gains 6 Block |
+| Escape | -- | Flees combat with stolen gold |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Thievery:** Steals gold whenever it attacks. Stolen gold is returned if the Looter is killed. If it escapes, gold is lost permanently.
+
+**Escape Sequence:** Smoke Bomb intent signals one turn left before it flees.
+
+## Act 2 Pairing
+
+Looter appears alongside Mugger in an Act 2 hallway fight (Looter + Mugger). Combined damage is 20+ per turn with no free setup turns.
ontology/enemies/mad-gremlin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Mad Gremlin
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 20-24
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Scratch every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Scratch | 4 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Has [[buffs/Enrage]] 1: gains 1 [[buffs/Strength]] whenever it takes damage
+- Do NOT spread incidental damage to it — each hit makes it stronger
ontology/enemies/mugger.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Mugger
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 48-52
+
+## Pattern
+
+Turns 1-2: Mug (10 damage + steals gold). Turn 3+: 50% Lunge (16 damage) or 50% Smoke Bomb (11 Block). After Smoke Bomb, uses Escape next turn (flees with stolen gold). Same sequence as Looter but higher damage and block values.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Mug | 10 | Steals gold |
+| Lunge | 16 | -- |
+| Smoke Bomb | -- | Gains 11 Block |
+| Escape | -- | Flees combat with stolen gold |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Gold Theft:** Same as Looter but appears in Act 2. Higher damage/block values.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Often paired with a Looter in the Looter + Mugger encounter.
ontology/enemies/mystic.md
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Mystic
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 48-56
+
+## Pattern
+
+Heals if any enemy missing 16+ HP (priority). Otherwise: 60% Attack, 40% Buff. Cannot use Attack or Buff 3x in a row. Can Heal 2x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Attack | 8 | Apply 2 [[debuffs/Frail]] |
+| Buff | -- | All enemies gain 2 [[buffs/Strength]] |
+| Heal | -- | All enemies heal 16 HP |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Heal targets ALL enemies (including self)
+- Heal threshold: any enemy missing 16+ HP
+- Buff affects [[enemies/Centurion]] too — escalating damage if left alive
ontology/enemies/nemesis.md
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# Nemesis
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 185 (A0), 200 (A8)
+
+## Pattern
+
+First turn: 50/50 chance of Scorch (Burns) or Attack. Subsequent turns: ~35% Scorch, ~35% Attack, ~30% Scythe. Cannot use Scorch or Scythe twice in a row. Cannot use Attack three times in a row. Every other turn starting from Turn 2, gains Intangible.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Attack (multi-hit) | 6x3 = 18 (7x3 = 21 at A3) | -- |
+| Scythe | 45 | Single massive hit |
+| Scorch | -- | Adds 3 Burns to discard pile (5 Burns at A18) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Intangible:** On Intangible turns, ALL damage dealt to Nemesis is reduced to 1 -- including poison ticks, Thorns, everything. Pattern: Turn 1 (no Intangible), Turn 2 (Intangible), Turn 3 (no), Turn 4 (Intangible), etc.
+
+**Burns:** Unplayable status cards. Deal 2 damage at end of turn if in hand. Accumulate and clog hand quality over the fight.
+
+**Effective Fight Length:** Intangible doubles the effective fight length since half your turns deal essentially zero damage.
ontology/enemies/orb-walker.md
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# Orb Walker
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 90-96 (A0), 92-102 (A7)
+
+Can appear as a single enemy or as a pair (2 Orb Walkers).
+
+## Pattern
+
+Each turn: 60% Laser, 40% Claw. Cannot use either move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Laser | 10 (11 at A2) | Adds 1 Burn to draw pile + 1 Burn to discard pile |
+| Claw | 15 (16 at A2) | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Strength Up 3:** Gains 3 Strength at end of each turn (5 at A17). Attacks every turn with increasing damage.
+
+- Turn 1: 10-15 damage per OW
+- Turn 2: 13-18 per OW
+- Turn 3: 16-21 per OW
+
+**Burns:** Added to draw pile. Clog the hand and deal 2 damage each at end of turn (4 for Burns+). In long fights, 4+ Burns deal 8-16 end-of-turn damage on top of attacks.
+
+**Two Orb Walker Variant:** Combined Str scaling is +6/turn. Combined incoming grows from 20 (Turn 1) to 44+ (Turn 4).
ontology/enemies/pointy.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# Pointy
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 30-36
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Stab every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 5x2 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Part of the [[encounters/2 Thieves]] encounter with [[enemies/Mugger]]
ontology/enemies/red-louse.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Red Louse
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 10-15
+
+## Pattern
+
+75% Bite, 25% Grow. Cannot use same move 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bite | 5-7 (random, set at combat start) | -- |
+| Grow | -- | Gain 3 [[buffs/Strength]] |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Has [[buffs/Curl Up]]: gains 3-7 [[buffs/Block]] when first hit by an attack
+- Grow gives permanent Strength — scales if left alive
ontology/enemies/red-slaver.md
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# Red Slaver
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 46-50
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Stab. Then repeats Scrape -> Scrape -> Stab until Entangle is used. Has 25% chance per turn to use Entangle instead of the normal pattern. After Entangle (used only once per combat): 55% Stab, 45% Scrape (cannot use same move 3x in a row).
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 13 (14 at A2) | -- |
+| Scrape | 8 (9 at A2) | Applies 1 Vulnerable (2 Vuln at A17) |
+| Entangle | -- | Applies Entangled (cannot play Attack cards this turn). Once per combat. |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Entangle:** Prevents playing ALL Attack cards for one turn. The only source of Entangled in the game. Can only be used once per combat. 25% chance per turn means it usually fires by turn 3-4.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Solo in Act 1. With Blue Slaver + Taskmaster in Act 2 elite Slavers fight.
ontology/enemies/reptomancer.md
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+# Reptomancer
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 3
+- **Reptomancer HP:** 180-190
+- **Dagger HP:** 20-25 each
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always opens with Summon Dagger. Afterward: approximately equal distribution of Snake Strike, Big Bite, and Summon Dagger. Cannot use Snake Strike or Big Bite twice in a row. Cannot use Summon Dagger three times in a row. If Summon Dagger is chosen with 4 Daggers already in play, uses Snake Strike instead. Maximum 4 Daggers active at any time.
+
+## Combat Setup
+
+Fight starts with Reptomancer + 2 Daggers (3 enemies total).
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Big Bite | 30 (34 at A3) | -- |
+| Snake Strike | 13x2 = 26 (16x2 = 32 at A3) | Applies 1 Weak |
+| Summon Dagger | -- | Summons 2 Daggers |
+
+## Dagger Pattern
+
+Fixed: Stab (9 damage + 1 Wound to discard) -> Explode (25 damage, Dagger dies). Each Dagger is a 2-turn time bomb.
+
+| Dagger Move | Damage | Effect |
+|-------------|--------|--------|
+| Stab | 9 | Adds 1 Wound to discard |
+| Explode | 25 | Dagger dies |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Dagger Time Bombs:** Starting 2 Daggers will Stab Turn 1 (9 each + Wounds) then Explode Turn 2 (25 each = 50 total). Meanwhile Reptomancer herself deals 26-30. Total incoming Turn 2 can exceed 75 damage.
+
+**Wound Generation:** Daggers add Wounds (Unplayable status) to discard via Stab.
ontology/enemies/repulsor.md
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Repulsor
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 29-35
+
+## Pattern
+
+Each turn, 80% chance to use Bash (adds 2 Dazed to draw pile), 20% chance to use Repulse (attack). Cannot use Repulse twice in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Repulse | 11 (13 at A2) | -- |
+| Bash | -- | Adds 2 Dazed cards to draw pile |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Dazed Generation:** Dazed cards are Unplayable + Ethereal status cards that clog the draw pile. Each Bash adds 2 Dazed, rapidly degrading hand quality. Over 4 turns, 6-8 Dazed cards can be added.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Appears with other Shapes (Spikers, Exploders) in the 3 Shapes encounter.
ontology/enemies/sentry.md
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+# Sentry
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 38-42 each (appears as group of 3)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Outer two Sentries start with Bolt, middle Sentry starts with Beam. They alternate: Bolt -> Beam -> Bolt -> Beam.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Bolt | -- | Adds 2 Dazed to discard pile |
+| Beam | 9 (10 at A2) | -- |
+
+Two Sentries on Beam = 18-20 total damage per turn.
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Artifact 1:** Each Sentry starts with 1 Artifact charge, blocking the first debuff application.
+
+**Dazed Generation:** Dazed cards are Unplayable + Ethereal status cards that clog draws. Each Bolt adds 2 Dazed to the discard pile.
+
+## Act 2 Appearance
+
+Sentries also appear in Act 2 hallway fights paired with other enemies (e.g., Sentry + Spheric Guardian). In these pairings, the Sentry still generates Dazed and attacks for ~9 damage per turn.
ontology/enemies/shelled-parasite.md
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# Shelled Parasite
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 68-72
+
+## Pattern
+
+Cannot use Fell on first turn. 40% Double Strike, 40% Life Suck, 20% Fell. Cannot use Double Strike or Life Suck 3x in a row. Cannot use Fell 2x in a row. At A17: always starts with Fell.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Double Strike | 6x2 = 12 (7x2 = 14 at A2) | -- |
+| Life Suck | 10 (12 at A2) | Heals equal to unblocked damage |
+| Fell | 18 (21 at A2) | Applies 2 Frail |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Plated Armor 14:** Reduces incoming damage by 14 per turn. Each attack that deals damage reduces Plated Armor by 1. Multi-hit attacks strip Plated Armor faster (Double Strike removes 2 stacks).
+
+**Stun on Break:** If all Plated Armor is broken, Shelled Parasite is Stunned for one turn (happens once per combat).
+
+**Life Suck Healing:** Heals for unblocked damage dealt, creating an attrition problem in long fights.
ontology/enemies/shield-gremlin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Shield Gremlin
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 12-15
+
+## Pattern
+
+While allies alive: Protect (give random ally 7 [[buffs/Block]]) every turn.
+When alone: Shield Bash every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Protect | -- | Give random ally 7 [[buffs/Block]] |
+| Shield Bash | 6 | Only when alone |
ontology/enemies/snake-plant.md
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# Snake Plant
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 75-79
+
+## Pattern
+
+65% Chomp (7x3 = 21 damage), 35% Enfeebling Spores (applies 2 Frail + 2 Weak). Cannot use Chomp 3x in a row, cannot use Enfeebling Spores 2x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Chomp | 7x3 = 21 (8x3 = 24 at A2) | -- |
+| Enfeebling Spores | -- | Applies 2 Frail + 2 Weak |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Malleable 3:** Upon receiving attack damage, gains Block. First hit: gains 3 block. Second hit: 4 block. Third hit: 5 block. Increases by 1 each time triggered in the same turn. Resets at start of player turn.
+
+**Frail + Weak Combination:** Frail cripples block (25% reduction) while Chomp (21-24) overwhelms weakened defenses.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Can appear in Unknown rooms (not just hallway combat).
ontology/enemies/sneaky-gremlin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# Sneaky Gremlin
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 10-14
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Puncture every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Puncture | 9 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Highest damage-per-HP ratio in Act 1. Kill priority target.
ontology/enemies/snecko.md
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# Snecko
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 114-120
+
+## Pattern
+
+Always starts with Perplexing Glare (Confused debuff). Then each turn: 60% Bite, 40% Tail Whip. Cannot use Bite 3x in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Perplexing Glare | -- | Applies Confused |
+| Bite | 15 (18 at A2) | -- |
+| Tail Whip | 8 (10 at A2) | Applies 2 Vulnerable (+ 2 Weak at A17) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Confusion:** When applied, all cards in hand are randomly assigned costs of 0-3 each turn for the rest of combat. Persists until combat ends.
+
+**X-Cost Interaction:** Whirlwind (X-cost) under Confusion uses ALL remaining energy regardless of randomized cost. X-cost cards are reliable under Confusion because they always consume whatever energy is left.
+
+**Tail Whip + Bite Combo:** Vulnerable from Tail Whip makes subsequent Bite attacks hit for 22+ damage.
+
+**Red Mask Relic:** Applies 1 Weak to Snecko at combat start, slightly reducing first attack.
ontology/enemies/spheric-guardian.md
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+# Spheric Guardian
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 20 (effectively 60+ with starting block)
+
+## Starting State
+
+- Artifact 3
+- Block 40
+- Barricade (block never expires)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Fixed sequence: Activate (25 Block) -> Slam (10 damage + 5 Frail) -> then alternates Slam (10x2 = 20 damage) and Harden (10 damage + 15 Block) for rest of combat.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Activate | -- | Gains 25 Block |
+| Slam (first) | 10 | Applies 5 Frail |
+| Slam (subsequent) | 10x2 = 20 | -- |
+| Harden | 10 | Gains 15 Block |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Barricade:** Block never expires. The Spheric Guardian gains block on defend turns (15-20 per action) and since block persists, it stacks indefinitely.
+
+**Artifact 3:** First 3 debuff applications are negated.
+
+**Frail 5:** Reduces block from ALL sources by 25% for 5 turns. Defend gives 3 instead of 5. Shrug It Off gives 6 instead of 8.
+
+**Malleable Block Growth:** Combined with alternating attack/defend, block grows faster than chip damage can remove it at low Strength.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Paired with Sentry in Act 2 hallway fights. Paired with Spikers in Act 3.
ontology/enemies/spike-slime-l.md
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Spike Slime L
+
+- **Type:** Hallway / Boss split
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 64-70 standalone, or equal to Slime Boss's remaining HP at split
+
+## Pattern
+
+30% Flame Tackle, 70% Lick. Cannot use same move three times in a row. Splits into 2x Spike Slime (M) when HP drops to 50% or below.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Flame Tackle | 16 (18 at A2) | Adds 2 Slimed cards to discard pile |
+| Lick | -- | Applies 2 Frail |
+| Split | -- | At 50% HP or below, spawns 2 Spike Slime (M) with current HP each |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Split at 50% HP:** Creates 2 medium slimes with current HP, extending the fight significantly.
+
+**Frail 2:** Reduces block gained from cards by 25%.
ontology/enemies/spike-slime-m.md
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Spike Slime M
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 28-32
+
+## Pattern
+
+30% Flame Tackle, 70% Lick. Cannot use same move three times in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Flame Tackle | 8 (10 at A2) | Adds 1 Slimed card to discard pile |
+| Lick | -- | Applies 1 Frail |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Frail:** Reduces player block by 25%.
+
+**Slimed Cards:** Cost 1E to exhaust, do nothing. Clog hand over time.
ontology/enemies/spike-slime-s.md
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Spike Slime S
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 1
+- **HP:** 10-14
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Tackle every turn.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Tackle | 5 (6 at A2) | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Produced by [[enemies/Spike Slime M]] when it uses [[debuffs/Split]]
+- No special abilities — just attacks
ontology/enemies/spiker.md
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+# Spiker
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 42-56
+
+## Pattern
+
+Each turn, 50/50 chance of Cut (attack) or Spike (buff Thorns). Cannot use Cut twice in a row. Cannot use Spike after it has been used 6 times (forces Cut instead).
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Cut | 7 (9 at A2) | -- |
+| Spike | -- | Gains +2 Thorns |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Thorns 3 (innate):** Starts with Thorns 3. Each Spike adds +2 Thorns. Every time the player deals attack damage to a Spiker, the player takes damage equal to current Thorns.
+
+**Thorns Scaling:** 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 9 -> 11 -> 13 -> 15 (after 6 Spikes, maximum reached). Multi-hit attacks trigger Thorns per hit (4-hit Blade Dance against Thorns 9 costs 36 HP).
+
+**Maximum Spikes:** After 6 Spike uses, Spiker can only use Cut.
+
+## Appearances
+
+Appears with other Shapes (Exploders, Repulsors) in the 3 Shapes encounter. Can appear in mixed Act 3 hallway fights.
ontology/enemies/spire-growth.md
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Spire Growth
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 170-190
+
+## Pattern
+
+Alternates between Constrict and Smash.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Constrict | -- | Apply 10 [[debuffs/Constricted]] (take 10 damage end of each turn) |
+| Smash | 22 | -- |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- High HP pool makes it a long fight
+- Constricted stacks: each application adds more end-of-turn damage
ontology/enemies/taskmaster.md
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Taskmaster
+
+- **Type:** Elite
+- **Act:** 2
+- **HP:** 54-60
+
+## Pattern
+
+Uses Scouring Whip every turn. Attacks from Turn 1.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Scouring Whip | 7 | Shuffle 1 Wound into discard pile |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+- Generates Wounds every turn, clogging deck over time
+- Part of the [[encounters/Slavers]] elite fight with [[enemies/Blue Slaver]] and [[enemies/Red Slaver]]
ontology/enemies/the-maw.md
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# The Maw
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 300 (does NOT change with Ascension)
+
+## Pattern
+
+- **Turn 1:** Roar (applies 3 Weak + 3 Frail). No damage.
+- **Turns 2+:** After Drool -> 50/50 Slam or Nom Nom. After Slam -> 50/50 Nom Nom or Drool. After Nom Nom -> always Drool.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Roar | -- | Applies 3 Weak + 3 Frail |
+| Slam | 25 (30 at A2) | -- |
+| Nom Nom | 5xN (N increases -- roughly current turn / 2 rounded up) | -- |
+| Drool | -- | Gains 3 Strength (5 at A5) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Turn 1 Debuff:** Applies Weak, Frail, and Vulnerable simultaneously. Lasts 2-3 turns.
+
+**Escalating Damage:** Early attacks are trivial (5-16 damage), but later attacks reach 33-56+.
+
+**Multiple Free Turns:** The Maw frequently buffs (Drool) instead of attacking, giving free turns for Power setup.
+
+**Fight Length:** 8-9 turns minimum due to 300 HP.
ontology/enemies/transient.md
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# The Transient
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 999
+- **Fading:** 5 (dies after 5 turns)
+
+## Pattern
+
+Attacks every turn with escalating damage:
+- Turn 1: 30 (40 at A2)
+- Turn 2: 40 (50 at A2)
+- Turn 3: 50 (60 at A2)
+- Turn 4: 60 (70 at A2)
+- Turn 5: 70 (80 at A2)
+
+Total damage over 5 turns: 250 at A0. Damage increases by 10 per turn.
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Fading 5:** Loses 1 per turn, dies at 0 (Fading 6 at A17). The Transient attacks BEFORE fading -- you must survive every hit including the last.
+
+**Shifting:** When the Transient takes damage, it LOSES that much Strength for the rest of the turn. If the Transient would deal 50 and you deal 20 damage to it, it only hits for 30. This means attacking REDUCES its damage this turn.
+
+**Damage Efficiency:** 1 energy on a Strike (6 damage) = 6 less incoming via Shifting = effectively 6 block. 1 energy on a Defend (5 block) = 5 block. Attacking is strictly better than blocking because damage dealt via Shifting reduces the attack AND you still play block cards with remaining energy.
ontology/enemies/writhing-mass.md
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# Writhing Mass
+
+- **Type:** Hallway
+- **Act:** 3
+- **HP:** 160 (175 at A7)
+
+## Pattern
+
+- First turn: equal random chance among Multi Hit, Big Hit, or Debuff Attack
+- Subsequent turns: 30% Multi Hit, 10% Big Hit, 20% Debuff Attack, 30% Block Attack, 10% Parasite
+- Parasite can only be used once. Same move cannot be used (or rerolled via Reactive) twice in a row.
+
+## Attacks
+
+| Move | Damage | Effect |
+|------|--------|--------|
+| Multi Hit | 7x3 = 21 (9x3 = 27 at A2) | -- |
+| Big Hit | 32 (38 at A2) | -- |
+| Debuff Attack | 10 (12 at A2) | Applies 2 Weak + 2 Vulnerable |
+| Block Attack | 15 (16 at A2) | Gains 16 Block |
+| Parasite | -- | Permanently adds Parasite curse to deck (once per combat) |
+
+## Mechanics
+
+**Reactive:** Changes the Writhing Mass's weakness/intent when the player plays certain card types. Unpredictable.
+
+**Malleable:** Gains block each time it is hit. Multi-hit attacks (Whirlwind, Pummel) are punished -- each hit gives it more block.
ontology/events/ancient-writing.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Ancient Writing
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Simplicity: Upgrade all Strikes and Defends in your deck
+ - Insight: Second option uncertain (possibly gain a card or relic)
ontology/events/big-fish.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Big Fish
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Banana: Heal to full HP
+ - Donut: Gain 5 Max HP
+ - Box: Obtain a relic, gain Regret [[types/Curse]]
ontology/events/bonfire-spirits.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Bonfire Spirits
+
+- **Act:** 1/2
+- **Options:**
+ - Offer: Remove a card from your deck (sacrifice it to the fire). Free, no cost.
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/colosseum.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Colosseum
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Continue (forced): Enter a 2-wave combat. No alternative to avoid the first wave.
+ - Wave 1: Fight 2 Slavers ([[enemies/Red Slaver]] + [[enemies/Blue Slaver]]). Combined ~20+ damage/turn. [[enemies/Blue Slaver]]'s [[debuffs/Entangled]] prevents attacks for 1 turn.
+ - After Wave 1: Choose Fight (Wave 2 for rewards) or COWARDICE (escape with no additional reward).
+ - Wave 2: Fight unpredictable enemies (can include [[enemies/Gremlin Nob]], [[enemies/Taskmaster]], or other elites).
+- **Note:** [[relics/Juzu Bracelet]] does NOT prevent this event (it is an event with forced combat, not a monster room).
ontology/events/council-of-ghosts.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Council of Ghosts
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Accept: Lose approximately 29-40 Max HP (scales with current Max HP). Gain 5 Apparition cards (Skill, 1E, Ethereal: gain [[buffs/Intangible]] for 1 turn, preventing ALL damage that turn).
+ - Refuse: Nothing happens
ontology/events/cursed-tome.md
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Cursed Tome
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Read: Start reading the book. At each stage choose Continue or Stop:
+ - Stage 1: Lose 1 HP
+ - Stage 2: Lose 2 HP
+ - Stage 3: Lose 3 HP
+ - Stage 4 (final): Lose 10 HP, obtain a book relic
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
+- **Total HP cost to complete:** 16 HP (1+2+3+10). Can leave at any stage.
+- **Known book relics:**
+ - [[relics/Enchiridion]]: Free random 0-cost [[types/Power]] card at start of each combat
+ - [[relics/Nilry's Codex]]: At end of each turn, choose 1 of 3 randomly generated cards to add to hand
+ - [[relics/Necronomicon]]: First [[types/Attack]] costing 2+ energy each turn plays twice. Adds Necronomicurse (unplayable, unremovable) to the deck.
ontology/events/face-trader.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Face Trader
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Engage: Lose HP, receive uncertain reward
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/forgotten-altar.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Forgotten Altar
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Sacrifice: Lose 20 HP, gain 5 Max HP
+ - Desecrate: Gain Decay [[types/Curse]] (2 damage/turn when in hand, Unplayable, Ethereal)
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/golden-idol.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Golden Idol
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Take: Obtain [[relics/Golden Idol]] relic (increases gold earned by ~25%), then choose a trap penalty:
+ - Outrun: Lose 6 Max HP
+ - Smash: Take 20 damage
+ - Hide: Gain a curse
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/knowing-skull.md
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Knowing Skull
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Ask for a card reward: Lose HP
+ - Ask for gold: Lose HP
+ - Ask for a potion: Lose HP
+ - Leave: Costs 6 HP (leaving is not free)
+- **Note:** HP cost escalates with each subsequent ask. Entering the dialogue commits you to at least 6 HP loss (the exit cost).
ontology/events/living-wall.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Living Wall
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Forget: Remove a card from your deck
+ - Grow: Upgrade a card in your deck
+ - Change: Transform a card in your deck
ontology/events/masked-bandits.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Masked Bandits
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Pay gold (toll): Lose all gold, avoid combat
+ - Fight: Fight a group of bandits (standard Act 2 combat encounter)
ontology/events/match-and-keep.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Match and Keep
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Play: Play a card-matching memory game. Cards are face-down in pairs. Flip two at a time -- if they match, that card is added to your deck. Limited number of attempts. Matched cards are automatically added (cannot refuse).
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/mind-bloom.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Mind Bloom
+
+- **Act:** 3
+- **Options:**
+ - I am War: Fight a random Act 1 boss. Obtain a Rare Relic on victory.
+ - I am Awake: Upgrade ALL cards in your deck. Obtain [[relics/Mark of the Bloom]] relic (you can no longer heal for the rest of the run).
+ - I am Rich: Gain 999 gold. Obtain 2 Normality [[types/Curse]]s (limit hand to 3 cards per turn).
+ - I am Healthy: Heal to full HP. Obtain Doubt [[types/Curse]] (1 [[debuffs/Weak]] at end of each turn).
ontology/events/mushrooms.md
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+# Mushrooms
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Stomp: Fight 3 [[enemies/Fungi Beast]]s. Reward: [[relics/Odd Mushroom]] relic ([[debuffs/Vulnerable]] multiplier reduced from 1.5x to 1.25x for player AND enemies)
+ - Eat: Heal 21 HP, gain Parasite [[types/Curse]] (Unplayable card that clogs draws permanently until removed)
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
+- **Fight details:** 3 [[enemies/Fungi Beast]]s apply [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] via Spore Cloud on death. Significantly harder than most Act 1 hallway fights. Expect 30-44 HP loss.
ontology/events/mysterious-sphere.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Mysterious Sphere
+
+- **Act:** 3
+- **Options:**
+ - Open Sphere: Fight a combat encounter (2 [[enemies/Orb Walker]]s). Reward: Rare Relic.
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
+- **Fight details:** 2 [[enemies/Orb Walker]]s with combined [[buffs/Strength]] scaling of +6/turn, plus Burns clogging draws and dealing end-of-turn damage. Can drain 40-70 HP even with a strong deck.
ontology/events/old-beggar.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Old Beggar
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Offer Gold: Pay 75 Gold, remove a card from your deck
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/ominous-forge.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Ominous Forge
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Forge: Upgrade a card in your deck (free, no cost)
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/pleading-vagrant.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Pleading Vagrant
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Offer Gold: Pay 85 Gold, obtain a Relic
+ - Rob: Obtain a Relic, gain a Curse
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/purifier.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Purifier
+
+- **Act:** 1/2
+- **Options:**
+ - Purify: Remove a card from your deck (free, no cost)
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/scrap-ooze.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Scrap Ooze
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Reach Inside: Lose 3 HP. 25% chance to find a Relic. Repeatable until you leave or succeed.
ontology/events/shining-light.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Shining Light
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Enter: Take 16 damage, upgrade 2 random cards in your deck
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/sssserpent.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Sssserpent
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Agree: Gain 175 gold, receive Doubt [[types/Curse]] (gain [[debuffs/Weak]] each turn in combat)
+ - Disagree: Nothing happens
ontology/events/the-cleric.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# The Cleric
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Heal: Heal HP
+ - Purify: Pay 50 Gold, remove a card from your deck
ontology/events/the-joust.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# The Joust
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Murderer: Bet 50 Gold. 70% chance to win 100 Gold, 30% chance to lose the 50 Gold.
ontology/events/the-library.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# The Library
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Read: Browse 20 cards and choose 1 to add to your deck
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/the-nest.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# The Nest
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Smash: Gain 99 Gold. No HP cost.
+ - Rest: Lose 6 HP, gain Ritual Dagger card (starts at 15 damage, gains +3 per kill, exhausts on use)
ontology/events/transmogrifier.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Transmogrifier
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Pray: Transform a card in your deck
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/vampires.md
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Vampires
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Accept: Lose ALL Strikes from your deck. Gain 5 Bite cards (1E Attack, 7 damage, heals 2 HP). Lose approximately 30% of Max HP (observed: 80 -> 56 = -24 Max HP).
+ - Refuse: Nothing happens
+- **Bite card:** 1 Energy, deal 7 damage, heal 2 HP. Colorless card (not class-specific).
ontology/events/wheel-of-change.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Wheel of Change
+
+- **Act:** 2/3
+- **Options:**
+ - Play: Spin the wheel for a random outcome. Known outcomes include: lose 8 HP, heal to full health. Full outcome table partially unknown.
ontology/events/woman-in-blue.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Woman in Blue
+
+- **Act:** 2
+- **Options:**
+ - Buy: Purchase potions for 20 Gold each
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/events/world-of-goop.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# World of Goop
+
+- **Act:** 1
+- **Options:**
+ - Gather Gold: Gain 75 Gold, lose 11 HP
+ - Leave: Nothing happens
ontology/potions/attack-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Attack Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Choose 1 of 3 random [[types/Attack]] cards and add it to your hand. It costs 0 energy this turn.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/blessing-of-the-forge.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Blessing of the Forge
+
+- **Effect:** Upgrade a random card in your deck. Permanent. Can be used outside of combat (at rest sites or on the map). The upgrade targets a random unupgraded card.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/blood-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Blood Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Heal 20% of Max HP (floor of maxHP * 0.2). At 80 Max HP heals 16; at 100 Max HP heals 20.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/cultist-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cultist Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain [[buffs/Ritual]] 1 (gain +1 [[buffs/Strength]] at the start of each subsequent turn, permanently stacking for the combat)
+- **Rarity:** Rare
ontology/potions/distilled-chaos.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Distilled Chaos
+
+- **Effect:** Play the top card of your draw pile for free (costs 0 energy). The card played is random (whatever is on top of the draw pile).
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/duplication-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Duplication Potion
+
+- **Effect:** This turn, your next card is played twice. Works on any card type ([[types/Attack]]s, [[types/Skill]]s, [[types/Power]]s).
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/elixir.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Elixir
+
+- **Effect:** Exhaust any number of cards in your hand that you choose
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/energy-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Energy Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain 2 Energy this turn
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/entropic-brew.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Entropic Brew
+
+- **Effect:** Fill all empty potion slots with random potions. Consumed on use. Can be used on the map (not in combat).
+- **Rarity:** Rare
ontology/potions/essence-of-steel.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Essence of Steel
+
+- **Effect:** Gain [[buffs/Plated Armor]] 4 (gain 4 [[buffs/Block]] at end of each turn, permanent for the combat). [[buffs/Plated Armor]] decreases by 1 each time you take unblocked damage.
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/explosive-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Explosive Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Deal 10 damage to ALL enemies
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Interaction:** Does not count as a card play (no [[debuffs/Slow]] interaction, no Velvet Choker count, no [[debuffs/Time Warp]] counter). Damage bypasses [[buffs/Block]] mechanics (goes directly to HP).
ontology/potions/fairy-in-a-bottle.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Fairy in a Bottle
+
+- **Effect:** When HP reaches 0, automatically revive with approximately 30% Max HP. Triggers automatically (no manual use needed). Consumed on trigger.
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Interaction:** Cannot be used against bosses proactively; it only triggers on lethal damage. Cards can still be played on the same turn after revival.
ontology/potions/fear-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Fear Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Apply [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] 3 to a target enemy. [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] increases damage taken by 50% for 3 turns.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/fire-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Fire Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Deal 20 damage to a target enemy
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/flex-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Flex Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain 2 [[buffs/Strength]] for this turn only. [[buffs/Strength]] is removed at end of turn.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/fruit-juice.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Fruit Juice
+
+- **Effect:** Gain 5 Max HP (permanent, persists after combat)
+- **Rarity:** Rare
ontology/potions/gamblers-brew.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Gambler's Brew
+
+- **Effect:** Discard any number of cards from your hand, then draw that many cards
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/liquid-memories.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Liquid Memories
+
+- **Effect:** Choose a card from your discard pile, return it to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Critical:** Recovers from the DISCARD pile only, NOT the exhaust pile. Exhausted cards cannot be recovered.
ontology/potions/power-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Power Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Choose from 3 random [[types/Power]] cards and add one to your hand. It costs 0 energy this turn.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/regen-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Regen Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain [[buffs/Regeneration]]. Heals HP each turn, decrementing: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 = 15 total HP over 5 turns.
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
ontology/potions/skill-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Skill Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Choose 1 of 3 random [[types/Skill]] cards and add it to your hand. It costs 0 energy this turn.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/smoke-bomb.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Smoke Bomb
+
+- **Effect:** Escape from a non-boss combat. Immediately ends the fight. No rewards are given.
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Interaction:** Cannot be used against bosses. Cards can still be played on the same turn before using Smoke Bomb. Does not count as a card play (no [[debuffs/Time Warp]] counter).
ontology/potions/snecko-oil.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Snecko Oil
+
+- **Effect:** Draw 5 cards. Randomize the cost of ALL cards in hand (0-3 energy each), including cards already in hand before the draw.
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Interaction:** Cards already in hand also get costs randomized. Similar to [[relics/Snecko Eye]]. When multiple copies exist with different randomized costs, the game selects the cheapest copy when played by name.
ontology/potions/speed-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Speed Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain 5 [[buffs/Dexterity]] for the current turn only. Adds 5 [[buffs/Block]] to every block-gaining card played that turn. [[buffs/Dexterity]] is removed at end of turn.
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/strength-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Strength Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Gain 2 [[buffs/Strength]] for the remainder of combat
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/potions/weak-potion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Weak Potion
+
+- **Effect:** Apply [[debuffs/Weak]] to an enemy (reduces their attack damage by 25%)
+- **Rarity:** Common
ontology/relics/akabeko.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Akabeko
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Your first [[types/Attack]] each combat deals 8 additional damage
ontology/relics/anchor.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Anchor
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain 10 Block at the start of each combat
ontology/relics/ancient-tea-set.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ancient Tea Set
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain 2 Energy on turn 1 if the previous room was a Rest site (5 energy turn 1 instead of 3)
ontology/relics/art-of-war.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Art of War
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** If you do not play an [[types/Attack]] during your turn, gain 1 extra Energy next turn
ontology/relics/astrolabe.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Astrolabe
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, choose and Transform 3 cards in your deck; the new cards are Upgraded
ontology/relics/bag-of-marbles.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bag of Marbles
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, apply 1 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] to ALL enemies
ontology/relics/bag-of-preparation.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bag of Preparation
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Draw 2 additional cards at the start of each combat
ontology/relics/bird-faced-urn.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bird-Faced Urn
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Whenever a [[types/Power]] card is played, heal 2 HP
ontology/relics/black-blood.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Black Blood
+
+- **Character:** Ironclad (Boss relic)
+- **Effect:** Replaces Burning Blood. At the end of combat, heal 12 HP (instead of 6)
ontology/relics/black-star.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Black Star
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Elites drop 2 relics instead of 1
ontology/relics/blood-vial.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Blood Vial
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Heal 2 HP at the start of each combat
ontology/relics/bloody-idol.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bloody Idol
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain 5 gold whenever you gain gold. Heal 5 HP whenever you gain gold.
ontology/relics/blue-candle.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Blue Candle
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** [[types/Curse]] cards can now be played; playing a [[types/Curse]] will exhaust it and deal 1 damage to you
ontology/relics/bottled-flame.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bottled Flame
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Choose an [[types/Attack]] card to become Innate (always in opening hand, turn 1)
ontology/relics/bottled-lightning.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Bottled Lightning
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Choose a [[types/Skill]] card at pickup. That card becomes Innate (always starts in hand at the beginning of combat).
+- **Note:** Bottles a [[types/Skill]] card only (not Attack or Power).
ontology/relics/bottled-tornado.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Bottled Tornado
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, choose a [[types/Power]] card. That card becomes Innate (starts in your hand at the beginning of every combat).
+- **Note:** Bottles a [[types/Power]] card only (not Attack or Skill).
ontology/relics/brass-ring.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Brass Ring
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, gain 1 [[buffs/Strength]]
ontology/relics/brimstone.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Brimstone
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, ALL characters gain 2 [[buffs/Strength]] (you AND every enemy)
ontology/relics/bronze-scales.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Bronze Scales
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Whenever you take damage from an Attack, deal 3 damage back to the attacker ([[buffs/Thorns]] 3)
ontology/relics/burning-blood.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Burning Blood
+
+- **Character:** Ironclad (Starter)
+- **Effect:** Heal 6 HP at the end of every combat
ontology/relics/busted-crown.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Busted Crown
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn (+1E, total 4E). Card reward choices reduced by 2 (from 3 to 1).
ontology/relics/cables.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cables
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Uncommon)
+- **Effect:** If you lost HP during the previous turn, at the start of your next turn Channel 1 Lightning orb
ontology/relics/calipers.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Calipers
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, block decays by 15 instead of fully expiring. If you have 20 block at end of turn, you start next turn with 5 block.
ontology/relics/calling-bell.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Calling Bell
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, obtain a [[types/Curse]] and 3 relics
ontology/relics/captains-wheel.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Captain's Wheel
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At the start of your 3rd turn each combat, gain 18 Block
ontology/relics/cauldron.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cauldron
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, choose and obtain 5 potions from a selection
ontology/relics/centennial-puzzle.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Centennial Puzzle
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Draw 3 extra cards the first time you lose HP each combat
+- **Trigger:** Losing HP (unblocked damage), not taking blocked damage
ontology/relics/ceramic-fish.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ceramic Fish
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Gain 9 gold whenever a card is added to the deck
ontology/relics/champion-belt.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Champion Belt
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you apply [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] to an enemy, also apply 1 [[debuffs/Weak]]
ontology/relics/charon-s-ashes.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Charon's Ashes
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Whenever a card is exhausted, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies
ontology/relics/chemical-x.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Chemical X
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a card with X cost, its effects are increased by 2
ontology/relics/cloak-clasp.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cloak Clasp
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At the end of your turn, gain 1 Block for each card in your hand
ontology/relics/clockwork-souvenir.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Clockwork Souvenir
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, gain 1 [[buffs/Artifact]] (negate the next debuff applied to you)
ontology/relics/coffee-dripper.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Coffee Dripper
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** +1 Energy per turn. You can no longer Rest at rest sites (upgrade only).
ontology/relics/cracked-core.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Cracked Core
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Starter)
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning orb
+- **Note:** If swapped for a boss relic via Neow, the Defect loses the guaranteed Turn 1 Lightning orb.
ontology/relics/cultist-headpiece.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cultist Headpiece
+
+- **Rarity:** Event
+- **Effect:** CAW! (purely cosmetic, no gameplay effect)
ontology/relics/cursed-key.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Cursed Key
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** +1 Energy per turn. Opening non-boss chests adds a [[types/Curse]] to your deck.
ontology/relics/damaru.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Damaru
+
+- **Character:** Watcher (Common)
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, gain 1 [[buffs/Mantra]]
ontology/relics/darkstone-periapt.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Darkstone Periapt
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you obtain a [[types/Curse]], increase your Max HP by 6
ontology/relics/data-disk.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Data Disk
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Common)
+- **Effect:** Start each combat with 1 [[buffs/Focus]]
ontology/relics/dead-branch.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Dead Branch
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Whenever you exhaust a card, add a random card to your hand. The random card costs its normal energy.
ontology/relics/dollys-mirror.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Dolly's Mirror
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, obtain a copy of a card in your deck
ontology/relics/dream-catcher.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Dream Catcher
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** When you rest at a rest site, you may add a card to your deck (card reward screen)
ontology/relics/du-vu-doll.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Du-Vu Doll
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** For each [[types/Curse]] in your deck, start each combat with 1 additional [[buffs/Strength]]
ontology/relics/ectoplasm.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Ectoplasm
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** +1 Energy per turn. You can no longer gain Gold.
+- **Note:** Gold already in pocket is not lost -- you just cannot gain more.
ontology/relics/emotion-chip.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Emotion Chip
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Uncommon)
+- **Effect:** If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all orbs at the start of your next turn (in addition to the normal end-of-turn passive trigger)
ontology/relics/empty-cage.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Empty Cage
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, remove 2 cards from your deck
ontology/relics/enchiridion.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Enchiridion
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, add a random [[types/Power]] card to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
ontology/relics/eternal-feather.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Eternal Feather
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP after combat
ontology/relics/face-of-cleric.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Face of Cleric
+
+- **Rarity:** Event
+- **Effect:** Raise Max HP by 1 at the end of each combat
ontology/relics/fossilized-helix.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Fossilized Helix
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Prevent the first instance of damage you would take each combat
ontology/relics/frozen-egg.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Frozen Egg
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you obtain a [[types/Power]] card, it is automatically upgraded
+- **Note:** Does not retroactively upgrade [[types/Power]]s already in the deck. Only applies to newly obtained [[types/Power]]s.
ontology/relics/frozen-eye.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Frozen Eye
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** You can see the order of your draw pile (cards are always visible)
ontology/relics/fusion-hammer.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Fusion Hammer
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** +1 Energy per turn. You can no longer Smith (upgrade cards) at Rest Sites.
ontology/relics/gambling-chip.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Gambling Chip
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards from your opening hand and draw that many new cards
ontology/relics/ginger.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ginger
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** You can no longer be [[debuffs/Weak]]ened. Completely negates the [[debuffs/Weak]] debuff from all sources.
ontology/relics/girya.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Girya
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 [[buffs/Strength]] at Rest Sites (instead of resting or upgrading). Can be used up to 3 times total.
ontology/relics/golden-eye.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Golden Eye
+
+- **Character:** Watcher (Rare)
+- **Effect:** Whenever you Scry, Scry 2 additional cards
ontology/relics/golden-idol.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Golden Idol
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Increases gold earned by approximately 25%
+- **Obtained:** Event (Golden Idol event, costs HP or Max HP to acquire)
ontology/relics/gremlin-horn.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Gremlin Horn
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever an enemy dies, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card
+- **Trigger:** Once per enemy death
ontology/relics/gremlin-visage.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Gremlin Visage
+
+- **Rarity:** Event
+- **Effect:** Start each combat with 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] applied to all enemies
ontology/relics/hand-drill.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Hand Drill
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Whenever you break an enemy's Block, apply 2 [[debuffs/Vulnerable]]
ontology/relics/happy-flower.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Happy Flower
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Every 3 turns, gain 1 Energy
ontology/relics/holy-water.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Holy Water
+
+- **Character:** Watcher (Boss relic)
+- **Effect:** Replaces Pure Water. At the start of each combat, add 3 Miracles to your hand (instead of 1)
ontology/relics/horn-cleat.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Horn Cleat
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of your 2nd turn in each combat, gain 14 Block
+- **Note:** Only triggers on turn 2. No benefit on turns 1, 3, 4, etc.
ontology/relics/hovering-kite.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Hovering Kite
+
+- **Character:** Silent (Boss relic)
+- **Effect:** The first time you discard a card each turn, gain 1 Energy
ontology/relics/ice-cream.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ice Cream
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Unspent Energy is saved between turns (Energy no longer resets at the start of your turn)
ontology/relics/incense-burner.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Incense Burner
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Every 6 turns, gain 1 [[buffs/Intangible]] (all damage reduced to 1 for that turn)
+- **Note:** Counter increments each turn across ALL combats and does NOT reset between fights. Track via relic tooltip.
ontology/relics/ink-bottle.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Ink Bottle
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Every 10th card you play, draw 1 additional card
+- **Note:** Counter persists across combats.
ontology/relics/inserter.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Inserter
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Boss relic)
+- **Effect:** Every 2 turns, gain 1 Orb slot
ontology/relics/juzu-bracelet.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Juzu Bracelet
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Unknown/Question Mark rooms (?) can no longer contain Monster fights. They always resolve as events.
+- **Shop price:** ~147 gold
ontology/relics/kunai.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Kunai
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Every time you play 3 [[types/Attack]]s in a single turn, gain 1 permanent [[buffs/Dexterity]] (for the combat)
+- **Note:** Whirlwind counts as 1 [[types/Attack]] play, not multiple. Double Tap's duplicated [[types/Attack]] counts toward the threshold.
ontology/relics/lantern.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Lantern
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 Energy on turn 1 of each combat (4 energy turn 1 instead of 3)
ontology/relics/lees-waffle.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Lee's Waffle
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic (~157g)
+- **Effect:** Raise Max HP by 7. Heal all HP.
ontology/relics/letter-opener.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Letter Opener
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a [[types/Skill]] card, deal 5 damage to a random enemy
ontology/relics/liquid-bronze.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Liquid Bronze
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you take damage from an Attack, deal 3 damage back to the attacker ([[buffs/Thorns]] 3)
ontology/relics/lizard-tail.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Lizard Tail
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** When HP reaches 0, heal to 50% Max HP. One-time use, then becomes inactive for the rest of the run.
ontology/relics/magic-flower.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Magic Flower
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Healing is 50% more effective (applies to all HP recovery)
ontology/relics/mango.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Mango
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14
ontology/relics/mark-of-pain.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Mark of Pain
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 additional Energy each turn (3E -> 4E). Whenever you play an [[types/Attack]], add a Wound (unplayable [[types/Status]] card) to your draw pile.
ontology/relics/mark-of-the-bloom.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Mark of the Bloom
+
+- **Rarity:** Event
+- **Effect:** You can no longer heal by any means
+- **Note:** Extremely dangerous. Obtained from the Mind Bloom event. Prevents all HP recovery for the rest of the run.
ontology/relics/matryoshka.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Matryoshka
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** The next 2 chests you open contain 2 relics instead of 1
+- **Note:** Has a charge counter (starts at 2, decrements per chest). Once spent, inert. Does not affect elite relic drops or boss relic choices -- only treasure chests.
ontology/relics/maw-bank.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Maw Bank
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Gain 12 gold after each non-shop floor. Spending gold at a shop disables the effect permanently.
ontology/relics/meal-ticket.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Meal Ticket
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Heal 15 HP whenever you enter a shop
ontology/relics/meat-on-the-bone.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Meat on the Bone
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** If HP is at or below 50% when combat ends, heal 12 HP
+- **Trigger:** End of combat, only if HP <= 50% max
ontology/relics/membership-card.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Membership Card
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** 50% discount on all items in the shop
ontology/relics/mercury-hourglass.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Mercury Hourglass
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** At the start of each turn, deal 3 damage to ALL enemies
+- **Note:** Does NOT trigger [[buffs/Sharp Hide]] (not an [[types/Attack]] card played). Does NOT count as an attack for Rage block.
ontology/relics/molten-egg.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Molten Egg
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** All [[types/Attack]] cards obtained for the rest of the run are automatically upgraded
ontology/relics/mummified-hand.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Mummified Hand
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play a [[types/Power]], a random card in your hand costs 0 for the turn
ontology/relics/mutagenic-strength.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Mutagenic Strength
+
+- **Rarity:** Event relic
+- **Effect:** Gain 3 [[buffs/Strength]] at the start of each combat. Lose 3 [[buffs/Strength]] at the end of your first turn.
+- **Obtained:** Event reward
ontology/relics/necronomicon.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Necronomicon
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare (Book relic)
+- **Effect:** The first [[types/Attack]] card costing 2 or more energy played each turn is played a second time automatically. Adds a Necronomicurse (unplayable, cannot be removed except by special means) to the deck.
+- **Obtained:** Cursed Tome event (costs 16 HP total)
+- **Note:** Triggers only on the FIRST 2+ cost [[types/Attack]] each turn. The entire card effect replays (damage, draw effects, channel effects, debuffs).
ontology/relics/neow-s-lament.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Neow's Lament
+
+- **Rarity:** Special (Neow offering)
+- **Effect:** Enemies in your next 3 combats have 1 HP. Gives 3 completely free fights.
ontology/relics/nilrys-codex.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Nilry's Codex
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At the end of each turn, you may choose 1 of 3 randomly generated cards to add to your hand. Cards can be from ANY class. You may skip.
+- **Obtained:** Cursed Tome event (costs 16 HP total)
ontology/relics/ninja-scroll.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ninja Scroll
+
+- **Character:** Silent (Uncommon)
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, add 3 Shivs to your hand
ontology/relics/nloths-gift.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# N'loth's Gift
+
+- **Rarity:** Event
+- **Effect:** Triples the next non-boss chest reward (grants 2 additional relics)
+- **Note:** Obtained by giving N'loth a relic in the N'loth event.
ontology/relics/nuclear-battery.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Nuclear Battery
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Boss relic)
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Plasma orb
ontology/relics/nunchaku.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Nunchaku
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Every 10th [[types/Attack]] card played, gain 1 Energy. Counter persists across combats.
ontology/relics/odd-mushroom.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Odd Mushroom
+
+- **Rarity:** Event relic
+- **Effect:** Reduces [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] damage multiplier from 1.5x to 1.25x when applied to YOU. Also reduces YOUR [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] application on enemies -- enemies take only 1.25x instead of 1.5x from your attacks while [[debuffs/Vulnerable]].
+- **Obtained:** Mushroom event reward
ontology/relics/oddly-smooth-stone.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Oddly Smooth Stone
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 [[buffs/Dexterity]] at the start of each combat
ontology/relics/old-coin.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Old Coin
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, gain 300 Gold
ontology/relics/omamori.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Omamori
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Negate the next 2 [[types/Curse]]s you would obtain
+- **Note:** Has a charge counter (starts at 2). Once both charges spent, inert.
ontology/relics/orange-pellets.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Orange Pellets
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Whenever you play an [[types/Attack]], [[types/Skill]], and [[types/Power]] in the same turn, remove ALL debuffs
ontology/relics/orichalcum.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Orichalcum
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** If you end your turn without Block, gain 6 Block
ontology/relics/ornamental-fan.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Ornamental Fan
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Gain 4 Block whenever you play 3 [[types/Attack]]s in a single turn
ontology/relics/orrery.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Orrery
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Upon pickup, choose and add 5 cards to your deck (one at a time from separate card reward screens)
ontology/relics/pandoras-box.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Pandora's Box
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Transform ALL Strike and Defend cards into random class cards
+- **Note:** One-time effect at acquisition. Random cards are from your own class.
ontology/relics/pantograph.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Pantograph
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Heal 25 HP at the start of boss fights. NOT a full heal -- exactly 25 HP.
ontology/relics/paper-crane.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Paper Crane
+
+- **Character:** Watcher (Uncommon)
+- **Effect:** Enemies deal 40% less damage while you are in Wrath form (does not apply to other stances)
+- **Note:** Offsets the double-damage-taken drawback of Wrath.
ontology/relics/paper-phrog.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Paper Phrog
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** [[debuffs/Vulnerable]] now increases damage taken by 75% instead of 50%
ontology/relics/peace-pipe.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Peace Pipe
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At Rest Sites, you may remove a card from your deck (instead of resting or upgrading)
ontology/relics/pear.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Pear
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** Gain 10 Max HP (permanent)
ontology/relics/pen-nib.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Pen Nib
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Every 10th [[types/Attack]] card played deals double damage. Counter persists across combats.
ontology/relics/philosophers-stone.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Philosopher's Stone
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 additional Energy each turn. ALL enemies start combat with 1 [[buffs/Strength]].
ontology/relics/pocketwatch.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Pocketwatch
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** If you play 3 or fewer cards during your turn, draw 3 additional cards next turn
ontology/relics/potion-belt.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Potion Belt
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** +2 potion slots (total 4-5 potion capacity)
ontology/relics/prayer-wheel.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Prayer Wheel
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** Normal enemies now drop card rewards (like Elites)
ontology/relics/preserved-insect.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Preserved Insect
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Enemies in Elite fights start with 25% less HP
+- **Obtained:** Elite reward (confirmed from [[enemies/Lagavulin]] fight)
ontology/relics/prismatic-shard.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Prismatic Shard
+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Card rewards and random card generation can now contain cards from any class
ontology/relics/pure-water.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Pure Water
+
+- **Character:** Watcher (Starter)
+- **Effect:** At the start of each combat, add 1 Miracle to your hand
+- **Note:** Miracle is a 0E card that gives +1 Energy, Retains between turns, and Exhausts when played.
ontology/relics/question-card.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Question Card
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Card reward screens now contain 1 additional card choice
ontology/relics/red-mask.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Red Mask
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Apply 1 [[debuffs/Weak]] to ALL enemies at the start of each combat
+- **Note:** [[debuffs/Weak]] duration is 1 turn only (wears off at start of enemy turn 2). Also strips 1 [[buffs/Artifact]] charge from enemies with [[buffs/Artifact]].
ontology/relics/red-skull.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Red Skull
+
+- **Character:** Ironclad (Common)
+- **Effect:** While your HP is at or below 50%, gain 3 [[buffs/Strength]]
ontology/relics/regal-pillow.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@

+
+- **Rarity:** Common

+

ontology/relics/ring-of-the-snake.md

+# Ring of the Snake
+
+- **Character:** Silent (Starter)
+- **Effect:** Draw 2 additional cards at the start of each combat
ontology/relics/runic-capacitor.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Runic Capacitor
+
+- **Character:** Defect (Common)

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Runic Cube
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 card
ontology/relics/runic-dome.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Runic Dome
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 additional Energy each turn (+1E). Enemy intents are hidden -- you cannot see what enemies plan to do.
ontology/relics/runic-pyramid.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Runic Pyramid
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your hand (all cards are retained)
ontology/relics/sacred-bark.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Sacred Bark
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Double the effectiveness of all potions
ontology/relics/self-forming-clay.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Self-Forming Clay
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain 3 Block next turn
+- **Note:** Does not stack cumulatively (taking damage multiple turns gives 3 block each subsequent turn, not additive)
ontology/relics/shovel.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Shovel
+
+- **Rarity:** Rare
+- **Effect:** At Rest Sites, you may dig for a relic (instead of resting or upgrading)
ontology/relics/shuriken.md

+# Shuriken
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Every time you play 3 [[types/Attack]]s in a single turn, gain 1 permanent [[buffs/Strength]] (for the combat)

ontology/relics/singing-bowl.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@

+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Slaver's Collar
+
+- **Rarity:** Uncommon
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 additional Energy during Elite and Boss combats (4 Energy instead of 3). Does NOT help in hallway fights.

+
+- **Rarity:** Shop relic
+- **Effect:** Start each Elite and Boss combat with +2 [[buffs/Strength]]

+# Smiling Mask
+
+- **Rarity:** Common
+- **Effect:** The card removal service at the shop costs 50 gold instead of increasing each use

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Snecko Eye
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Draw 2 additional cards each turn (7 total). Start each combat Confused (all card costs randomized 0-3).

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# Snecko Skull
+
+- **Character:** Silent (Common)
+- **Effect:** Whenever you apply [[debuffs/Poison]], apply 1 additional [[debuffs/Poison]]

+# Sozu
+
+- **Rarity:** Boss
+- **Effect:** Gain 1 additional Energy each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.

+- **Trigger:** Fires once per fight, only on turn 7
ontology/relics/strange-spoon.md
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
